Result: 通过严格理论分析和大量实验证明，DECA实现了快速收敛、强下游性能和显著资源效率。

Conclusion: DECA在隐私敏感和资源受限的去中心化环境中，有效解决了全参数微调的高资源消耗和非独立同分布数据带来的训练不稳定问题。

Abstract: Fine-tuning large language models (LLMs) in privacy-sensitive and resource-constrained environments remains challenging. Since training data are often distributed across multiple clients, decentralized fine-tuning offers a natural paradigm for collaborative adaptation without a central server. However, enabling full-parameter fine-tuning (FPFT) in this decentralized setting is difficult: FPFT provides strong adaptation capacity but incurs prohibitive resource consumption for billion-scale models. Existing decentralized LLM fine-tuning methods therefore mainly rely on parameter-efficient updates, which improve efficiency but may restrict downstream performance. Moreover, client data are typically non-IID, making decentralized optimization more vulnerable to client drift and unstable convergence. To address these challenges, we propose DECA, a resource-efficient decentralized FPFT framework for LLMs on non-IID data. DECA partitions model parameters into disjoint blocks and performs sequential block-wise Adam optimization, reducing resource consumption while preserving decentralized full-parameter adaptation. To stabilize training, DECA further introduces first- and second-order block-wise moment estimates with fresh local gradient statistics and consensus-derived discrepancy signals. We provide rigorous theoretical analysis and extensive experiments, showing that DECA achieves fast convergence, strong downstream performance, and significant resource efficiency.

</details>


### [371] [Bayesian Tensor Decomposition with Diffusion Model Prior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03212)
*Zerui Tao,Qibin Zhao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出DiffBCP，一种混合先验贝叶斯CP分解框架，将累积收缩过程先验（自动选择秩）与预训练扩散模型（隐式数据先验）结合，通过分裂吉布斯采样器实现可推断的后验，在图像修复和去噪任务上优于多种基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低秩张量分解在数据严重缺失或噪声下性能退化，传统手工先验（稀疏性、平滑性）不足以捕捉真实数据的丰富统计特征，而扩散模型难以直接兼容现有的张量分解和可处理的后验推断。

Method: 提出DiffBCP框架：1) 在CP因子上引入累积收缩过程先验实现自动秩选择；2) 将预训练扩散模型作为隐式数据先验；3) 开发分裂吉布斯采样器，CP因子共轭更新，扩散块通过低秩引导去噪采样；4) 设计噪声自适应耦合调度减少对手动退火参数的敏感性。

Result: 在图像修复和去噪实验（包括高分辨率分布外图像）中，DiffBCP一致优于贝叶斯、非线性和即插即用张量分解基线方法。

Conclusion: 将扩散模型作为隐式数据先验与贝叶斯张量分解结合是有效策略，分裂吉布斯采样器使后验推断可行，噪声自适应调度提升了鲁棒性。

Abstract: Low-rank tensor decomposition (TD) is usually effective on clean, fully observed data, but it often degrades under severe missingness or noise. Low-rankness is itself a useful but limited structural prior, and additional handcrafted priors (e.g., sparsity or smoothness) still fall short of capturing the rich statistics of real-world data. To compensate for this weak inductive bias under heavy corruption, one would like to inject a learned, data-driven prior; however, the state-of-the-art diffusion models are not readily compatible with current TD and tractable posterior inference. To address these challenges, we introduce DiffBCP, a hybrid-prior Bayesian CP decomposition framework that couples a cumulative shrinkage process prior over the CP factors for automatic rank selection with an off-the-shelf pre-trained diffusion model as an implicit data prior on the reconstructed tensor. To make posterior inference tractable despite the coupling among the likelihood, low-rank constraint, and diffusion prior, we develop a split Gibbs sampler: CP factors admit conjugate updates, while the diffusion block is sampled via low-rank-guided denoising. A noise-adaptive coupling schedule further reduces sensitivity to hand-tuned annealing. Experiments on image inpainting and denoising, including high-resolution out-of-distribution images, show consistent gains over Bayesian, nonlinear, and plug-and-play TD baselines.

</details>


### [372] [Learning Temporal Causal Structure via Smooth Differentiable Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03227)
*Tong Zhao,Ce Guo,Wayne Luk,Emil Lupu,Ray Dipojjwal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出利用Gumbel-Sinkhorn算子学习可微变量排序，将SVAR模型中的瞬时系数矩阵三角化，从而将无环性从硬约束转化为参数化形式，实现统一的梯度优化，在因果发现中大幅提升效率（最高6倍加速）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理多元时间序列的瞬时因果发现时，要么采用多阶段流水线分离估计瞬时和滞后结构，要么通过增广拉格朗日优化施加代数无环性约束，两者计算成本都很高。

Method: 利用Gumbel-Sinkhorn算子学习可微的变量排列顺序，然后在该顺序下对SVAR模型的瞬时系数矩阵进行三角化（下三角化），从而将无环性硬约束转化为模型参数化的一部分，支持端到端的连续梯度优化。

Result: 在三个真实世界基准测试中，与12种基线方法相比，本方法在发现准确性和效率上均取得了最佳整体性能；在大规模基准上实现了超过6倍的加速，展现出强可扩展性。

Conclusion: 通过将无环性转化为参数化结构，统一了瞬时和滞后因果结构的优化过程，显著提升了时间序列因果发现的效率和可扩展性。

Abstract: Causal discovery with instantaneous effects in multivariate time series is challenging, as the instantaneous structure must be acyclic. Prior methods enforce this by either separating instantaneous and lagged estimation into multi-stage pipelines or imposing algebraic acyclicity constraints via complex augmented Lagrangian optimization, both of which incur high computational cost. In this work, we propose a different approach: we learn a differentiable permutation of variables using the Gumbel--Sinkhorn operator and triangularize the instantaneous coefficient matrix of a Structural Vector Autoregressive (SVAR) model in the learned order. This converts acyclicity from a hard constraint into a parameterization and keeps it valid throughout optimization. In doing so, our method enables unified, continuous optimization with gradient-based learning, leading to improved efficiency in time--series causal discovery. Across three real-world benchmarks, our method achieves the best overall performance compared with 12 baselines in both discovery accuracy and efficiency. On the large-scale benchmark, it further demonstrates strong scalability, achieving more than a 6x speedup over competing methods.

</details>


### [373] [GFFMERGE: Efficient Merging of Graph Neural Force Fields and Beyond](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03232)
*Parth Verma,Parv P. Singh,Vipul Garg,Ishita Thakre,N. M. Anoop Krishnan,Sayan Ranu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GFFMERGE，首个面向图神经网络力场的闭式模型合并框架。通过利用消息传递层的线性结构，将合并问题转化为凸嵌入对齐问题并给出解析解。在分子、固态和大规模图基准测试中，相比重新训练实现5-27倍加速，且合并后的模型性能接近联合训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图神经网络力场模型在适应新化学系统时需要昂贵的重新训练，而视觉和语言领域的模型合并方法在力场回归任务上表现不佳，亟需专门针对GNN力场的模型合并框架。

Method: 利用消息传递层的线性结构特性，将模型合并形式化为凸嵌入对齐问题，推导出闭式解析解。同时提出GNNMERGE作为通用的GNN合并框架，通过系统基准测试验证有效性。

Result: 在MD17、MD22、LiPS20等基准上实现5-27倍加速；闭式解在微调前即超越所有基线方法；作为初始化能提供更快、数据效率更高的收敛。

Conclusion: GFFMERGE是首个针对GNN力场的原理性模型合并框架，在效率上大幅优于重新训练，且为后续微调提供了更优的初始化起点。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have revolutionized Neural Force Fields for atomistic simulations, achieving near-quantum accuracy at reduced cost, yet adapting these models to new chemical systems requires expensive retraining of foundation models. Inspired by model merging in vision and language processing, we introduce GFFMERGE, the first principled framework for closed-form model merging in GNNs. We exploit the linear structure of message-passing layers and formulate merging as a convex embedding-alignment problem with an analytical solution. Through the first systematic benchmarking of model merging for GNNs, we show that existing methods designed for vision and language catastrophically fail on force field regression, while GFFMERGE recovers performance approaching gold standard joint training. Across molecular (MD17, MD22), solid-state (LiPS20), and large-scale graph benchmarks, GFFMERGE and GNNMERGE (its generic GNN counterpart) achieve 5-27$\times$ speedups while enabling modular composition of specialized models. Remarkably, our closed-form solution alone outperforms all baseline methods before fine-tuning and provides superior initialization for faster, data-efficient convergence.

</details>


### [374] [Right Makes Might: Aligning Verified Hidden States Empowers RL Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03234)
*Ziyue Wang,Aomufei Yuan,Yongfu Zhu,Shuai Dong,Wenpu Liu,Yiran Yao,Weichu Xie,Yuqi Xu,Caoyuan Ma,Wenqi Shao,Xiaoying Zhang,Nan Duan,Jiaqi Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Hidden-Align方法，通过在强化学习训练中对正确rollout的锚点token（答案标记前一个位置）的最后一层隐藏状态进行对齐，利用正确rollout在该位置的自然收敛特性，提升模型数学推理能力。在8个数学推理基准上，Qwen3-1.7B/4B/14B分别提升3.8、6.2、5.4个百分点pass@1。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前RLVR方法将每个正确rollout简化为单比特奖励信号，忽略了其隐藏状态间共享的几何结构。作者发现正确rollout在锚点token处自然收敛（余弦相似度~0.84），但仍保留因不同推理路径带来的残差方差，因此希望利用这一结构进一步对齐，提取统一的"正确决策"表征，降低模型对推理路径的敏感性。

Method: 提出Hidden-Align辅助损失函数，在RL训练期间对正确rollout在锚点token处的最后一层隐藏状态进行对齐，训练和推理阶段零额外开销。锚点token定义为答案标记前一个位置。

Result: 在8个数学推理基准上，Hidden-Align在DAPO基线基础上，Qwen3-1.7B提升3.8个百分点pass@1，4B提升6.2个百分点，14B提升5.4个百分点；pass@k在所有三个规模上均有提升；通过消融实验验证了损失类型、锚点位置、层深度和损失权重的影响。

Conclusion: 通过对正确rollout在锚点token处的隐藏状态进行对齐，可以有效提升数学推理能力，且不增加额外开销。该方法利用了正确的几何结构先验，在不同模型规模上均取得一致改进。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has become the dominant approach for improving mathematical reasoning in large language models, yet current methods reduce each correct rollout to a single reward bit, ignoring the geometric structure shared among their hidden states. Investigating this structure, we find that at the anchor token (the position immediately before the answer marker), correct rollouts converge naturally because they must produce the same answer (cosine similarity ~0.84), yet each retains residual variance from its unique reasoning path. Encouraging full alignment at this point pushes the model to extract a unified "correct decision" representation, reducing sensitivity to which reasoning path was taken. Based on this observation, we propose Hidden-Align, an auxiliary loss function that aligns the last-layer hidden states of correct rollouts at the anchor token during RL training, with zero overhead in both training and inference. On eight mathematical reasoning benchmarks, Hidden-Align improves average pass@1 over the DAPO baseline by 3.8, 6.2, and 5.4 percentage points on Qwen3-1.7B, 4B, and 14B respectively, with consistent pass@k gains across all three scales, supported by ablations on loss type, anchor position, layer depth, and loss weight.

</details>


### [375] [When RLHF Fails: A Mechanistic Taxonomy of Reward Hacking, Collapse, and Evaluator Gaming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03238)
*Zelalem Abahana*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究对RLHF管线中的奖励破解（reward hacking）进行了系统性的失效模式分类与定位，发现激进PPO局部奖励破解率最高（14.45%），而UP-PPO能降低该风险，并提出一种可提前预测奖励破解的逻辑回归模型（ROC-AUC 0.821）。核心结论是RLHF失败不仅是最终模型病态，更是可分类、可定位、可部分预判的训练动态。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLHF通过可学习的代理奖励替代人类真实目标，但这种替代天然存在结构化失效空间：优化可能提升学习奖励但牺牲外部质量，导致奖励破解问题。现有研究多将其视为单一终局事件，缺乏对训练过程中局部失效模式的系统分类与定位。

Method: 构建紧凑RLHF管线，包含PPO、DPO、UP-PPO等多种算法，引入奖励模型不确定性、策略漂移、多样性和重复性诊断指标及两个外部LLM评判器。基于学习奖励、评判器分数和平均评判器分数的方向变化，对检查点间的转换进行分类。使用逻辑回归模型预测局部奖励破解。

Result: 分析61个检查点行和1920个行级转换：激进PPO局部奖励破解率最高（14.45%，95% CI: 10.16-18.75），UP-PPO在相同激进设置下降低至11.33-10.94%。逻辑回归模型预测ROC-AUC达0.821。在12个设置中有3个发现了检查点平均值无法捕捉的局部奖励破解。

Conclusion: RLHF失效不仅是最终模型的病态表现，更是可分类、可定位、可部分预判的训练动态过程，而非单一的终局事件。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) makes large-scale post-training possible by replacing an underspecified human objective with learned and scalable proxies. The same substitution creates a structured failure surface: optimization can raise the learned reward while external quality falls, degrade both proxy and judge scores, reveal proxy under-alignment, or produce evaluator-specific disagreement. We present an empirical failure-mode study of a compact RLHF pipeline with proximal policy optimization (PPO), direct preference optimization (DPO), uncertainty-penalized PPO (UP-PPO), reward-model uncertainty, approximate policy drift, diversity and repetition diagnostics, and two external LLM judges. Rather than treating reward hacking as a single terminal event, we classify matched transitions between checkpoints using the directions of the learned reward, judge scores, and average judge score. Across 61 checkpoint rows and 1920 row-level transitions, aggressive PPO has the highest localized reward-hacking rate (14.45%; bootstrap 95% CI: 10.16-18.75), while UP-PPO yields lower rates in the same aggressive regime (11.33-10.94%). A pre-transition logistic model predicts future row-level reward hacking with ROC-AUC 0.821, and row-level analysis finds localized reward hacking that checkpoint averages miss in 3 of 12 settings. The central conclusion is methodological: RLHF failures are not only final-model pathologies, but training dynamics that can be classified, localized, and partially anticipated.

</details>


### [376] [EqGINO: Equivariant Geometry-Informed Fourier Neural Operators for 3D PDEs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03260)
*Sungwon Kim,Juho Song,Seungmin Shin,Guimok Cho,Sangkook Kim,Chanyoung Park*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出EqGINO，一种在谱域中强制执行各向同性的几何鲁棒框架，用于3D PDE的深度学习代理，能保证对离散对称性的精确等变性，并能泛化到任意连续旋转。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度学习方法处理3D PDE时，要么依赖坐标系统导致几何变换下泛化差（如非等变网络），要么虽然等变但在空间域局部操作导致全局感受野昂贵（如等变CNN），要么谱域方法（FNO）难以建立3D等变性。需要一种兼顾全局交互捕获与几何鲁棒性的方法。

Method: EqGINO在谱域中强制各向同性，通过对离散化计算域固有对称性提供精确等变性保证，同时利用结构先验实现在有限SE(3)变换训练样本下泛化到任意连续旋转。

Result: 在复杂不规则3D几何上，EqGINO能够鲁棒地建模坐标不变的物理定律，对离散对称性保证精确等变，对连续旋转具有良好的泛化能力。

Conclusion: EqGINO弥合了傅里叶神经算子全局交互能力与3D等变性需求之间的差距，为3D PDE的几何鲁棒深度学习提供了有效框架。

Abstract: Deep learning surrogates for 3D Partial Differential Equations (PDEs) often fail to generalize across geometric transformations because they depend heavily on specific coordinate systems. While equivariant networks offer a solution, they typically rely on local operations in the spatial domain, making the global receptive field, which is essential for PDE dynamics, computationally expensive. Conversely, Fourier Neural Operators (FNOs) efficiently capture global interactions, yet establishing 3D equivariance within them remains impractical due to the prohibitive cost of spectral group convolutions. To bridge this gap, we introduce EqGINO, a geometrically robust framework that enforces isotropy in the spectral domain. By design, EqGINO guarantees exact equivariance to the discrete symmetries inherent to the discretized computational domain. Beyond this discrete guarantee, our structural prior enables effective generalization to arbitrary continuous orientations even with a limited number of SE(3)-transformed training samples. Consequently, our method robustly models coordinate-invariant physical laws on complex irregular 3D geometries. Our code is available at https://github.com/sung-won-kim/EqGINO

</details>


### [377] [Let There Be Light: Reflection, Refraction and Scattering for Neural Operators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03262)
*Keke Wu,Yixuan Zhang,Jingrun Chen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Light-inspired Neural Operator (LiNO)，将神经算子的潜在演化分解为反射、折射和散射三种机制，其中散射通过正特征全局传播和局部扩散将空间复杂度从二次降至线性，在保持可解释性的同时实现了高效的全局空间通信。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有神经算子架构（如傅里叶神经算子、注意力机制等）在物理可解释性、非局部空间通信、网格可扩展性和计算成本之间存在难以调和的权衡，缺乏一种兼具结构化可解释性与高效全局通信的算子学习框架。

Method: 提出LiNO架构：(1) 将潜在演化分解为反射(reflection)、折射(refraction)和散射(scattering)三种光启发性机制；(2) 反射/折射作为自适应逐点变换实现局部特征重定向和各向异性调制；(3) 散射实现输入依赖的非局部传播，先公式化为带相对位置偏置的归一化成对核，再引入高效变体——用正特征全局传播和局部扩散分支替代显式成对交互，将空间复杂度从O(n²)降至O(n)。

Result: 散射机制的高效变体将空间复杂度从二次降低到线性，在保持非局部通信能力的同时大幅降低计算成本。

Conclusion: LiNO通过将局部特征调制与全局空间通信分离，构建了模块化、可解释的潜在演化过程，为神经算子设计提供了新的结构化范式。

Abstract: Neural operators learn mappings between infinite-dimensional function spaces and provide a data-driven surrogate modeling paradigm for parametric partial differential equations (PDEs). Existing architectures typically obtain expressivity by parameterizing integral kernels in prescribed transform domains or by applying attention-like interactions over discretized spatial points. While these approaches have achieved substantial progress, they often face a persistent trade-off among physical interpretability, nonlocal spatial communication, mesh scalability, and computational cost. We propose a Light-inspired neural operator(LiNO), an operator-learning architecture whose latent evolution is decomposed into three mechanisms motivated by elementary light transport: reflection, refraction, and scattering. Reflection and refraction act as adaptive pointwise transformations in latent feature space, enabling local feature reorientation and anisotropic modulation, whereas scattering performs input-dependent nonlocal propagation over the physical domain. We first formulate scattering as a normalized pairwise kernel with relative positional bias, and then develop an efficient scattering variant that replaces explicit pairwise interactions with positive-feature global propagation and a local diffusion branch, reducing the dominant spatial complexity from quadratic to linear. This yields a structured neural operator that separates local feature modulation from global spatial communication while retaining a modular and interpretable latent evolution.

</details>


### [378] [Are Common Substructures Transferable? Riemannian Graph Foundation Model with Neural Vector Bundles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03270)
*Li Sun,Zhenhao Huang,Yiding Wang,Qin Chen,Pietro Lio,Philip S. Yu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出神经向量束框架（GAUGE），通过黎曼几何刻画图表示空间的内蕴几何结构，实现可迁移子结构的预训练-适配，在零样本链接预测和图同构任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图基础模型的结构可迁移性理论不清晰，离散子结构迁移存在局限，需从连续几何视角理解可迁移子结构的本质。

Method: 提出Neural Vector Bundle框架，用黎曼几何刻画表示空间内蕴几何；设计GAUGE架构构建向量束，展平几何兼容的局部坐标；引入Dirichlet损失度量迁移代价。

Result: 在零样本链接预测和图同构任务上验证了优越的表达能力。

Conclusion: 从功能行为视角理解图结构迁移性，通过内蕴几何学习实现了结构上可迁移的预训练范式，为图基础模型提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: Foundation models have sparked a revolution via a pretraining-adaptation paradigm, with recent efforts extending this success to graphs. Unlike other modalities, graphs contain rich structural patterns, yet their structural transferability remains poorly understood. Prior studies consider common substructures in the discrete realm, and we are motivated by a fundamental question: Are common substructures transferable? The underlying theory is largely underexplored. In this work, we shift toward learning transferable structures through the lens of functional behavior. Theoretically, we connect transferable substructures to intrinsic geometry of the representation space. However, characterizing such intrinsic geometry has rarely been touched. Grounded in Riemannian geometry, we develop a graph intrinsic geometry learning framework called Neural Vector Bundle, which enables parsing intrinsic geometry with local coordinates. Building on this, we design GAUGE, a pretrainable neural architecture that constructs the vector bundle, flattening geometrically compatible local coordinates, and a new Dirichlet loss, which also measures the transfer effort. We empirically validate its superior expressiveness in challenging tasks including zero-shot link prediction and graph isomorphism.

</details>


### [379] [A Geometric Lens on Physics-Aligned Data Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03279)
*Aleix Segui,Wesley Armour*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文在理论上解释了AI for Science中使用物理信息损失函数训练科学数据压缩器时，保物理量与保重建质量之间存在根本性权衡，并提出了一个基于局部几何理论的各向异性误差分配机制和排齐诊断工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管物理信息损失函数在科学数据压缩中被广泛使用，但其率失真（rate-distortion）的理论特性尚不清晰，特别是保物理量与标准重建失真之间的权衡缺乏严格解释。

Method: 建立局部几何理论，通过潜空间敏感度分析揭示熵模型、物理可观测量和失真度量之间的相互作用，推导局部切空间率失真定律，并提出基于主特征空间重叠的排齐诊断方法。

Result: 理论上证明了当敏感度方向未对齐时，提升物理量保真度必然损害标准失真，存在根本性限制；实验验证了排齐诊断与观测到的物理/数据空间权衡之间的相关性。

Conclusion: 揭示了物理感知压缩中保物理量与保重建质量的不可兼得性，提供了理论解释和实用诊断工具，为科学数据压缩的损失函数设计提供了理论指导。

Abstract: In AI for Science, physics-informed losses are increasingly used to train learned compressors for scientific data, but their rate-distortion implications remain poorly understood. At fixed bitrate, these objectives often improve preservation of a target physical observable while degrading standard reconstruction fidelity. We develop a local geometric theory showing that this tradeoff is governed by the interaction of latent-space sensitivities induced by the entropy model, the physical observable, and the distortion metric. At each operating point, these induce preferred directions along which compression noise should be suppressed, yielding an anisotropic error-allocation mechanism. When these directions are misaligned, improving the observable at fixed rate necessarily worsens standard distortion, establishing a fundamental limit on simultaneous preservation. We formalise this through a local tangent-space rate-distortion law and introduce a practical alignment diagnostic based on dominant eigenspace overlap. Experiments across scientific domains test the theory and validate that the alignment diagnostic correlates with observed data- and physics-space trade-offs.

</details>


### [380] [Message Tuning Outshines Graph Prompt Tuning: A Prismatic Space Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03290)
*Yancheng Chen,Dun Ma,Shuai Zhang,Yang Liu,Xixun Lin,Xiangyu Zhao,Wenguo Yang,Wei Chen,Chuan Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出棱镜空间理论（PS-Theory）量化图提示调优的适应能力上界，并基于该理论设计消息调优（MTG）方法，通过注入可学习消息原型突破图提示调优的理论上限，实验验证了其优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 图提示调优虽然已被解释为什么有效，但如何严格衡量其适应能力仍是一个开放问题，而这对于理解其能力极限和开发更强适应方法至关重要。

Method: 提出PS-Theory理论框架量化适应方法的能力上限；基于该理论设计MTG方法，在GNN骨干网络每层注入少量可学习消息原型，自适应引导消息融合，无需更新预训练权重。

Result: 通过PS-Theory证明MTG的适应能力可超过图提示调优的理论上界；在多个基准数据集上，MTG一致优于图提示基线方法。

Conclusion: PS-Theory为衡量图适应方法能力提供了严格框架，MTG作为一种轻量级方法有效突破了图提示调优的能力上限，理论与实验相互印证。

Abstract: Graph Foundation Models (GFMs), built upon the Pre-training and Adaptation paradigm, have emerged as a research hotspot in graph learning. For GNN-based GFMs, graph prompt tuning has become the prevailing adaptation method for downstream tasks. Although recent methods explain why graph prompt tuning works, how to rigorously measure its adaptation capacity remains an open problem. Addressing this problem is critical for understanding the capability limits of graph prompt tuning and for developing more powerful adaptation methods. In this paper, we propose Prismatic Space Theory (PS-Theory), a novel mathematical framework to quantify the capacity of adaptation methods, while focusing on establishing the upper bound for the adaptation capacity of graph prompt tuning. Building upon the proposed PS-Theory, we further introduce Message Tuning for GFMs (MTG), a lightweight approach that injects a small set of learnable message prototypes into each layer of the GNN backbone to adaptively guide message fusion without updating pre-trained weights. Through our PS-Theory, we prove that the adaptation capacity of MTG can exceed the theoretical upper bound of graph prompt tuning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MTG consistently outperforms graph prompt baselines across diverse benchmark datasets, providing strong empirical support for our theoretical findings.

</details>


### [381] [Learning Multi-Scale Hypergraph for High-Order Brain Connectivity Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03310)
*Jaeyoon Sim,Soojin Hwang,Seunghun Baek,Guorong Wu,Won Hwa Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出自适应多尺度超边学习框架MuHL，通过动态构建多分辨率超边来捕获脑网络中的高阶交互，在神经退行性疾病分类中优于现有方法，并能识别与疾病进展相关的关键脑区及其交互模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图模型主要关注直接连接的节点对间的成对交互，难以捕获跨多个脑区的高阶依赖；而超图方法依赖预定义超边或仅学习超边权重，缺乏灵活性，无法捕获多尺度结构模式。

Method: 提出MuHL框架：构建层次化节点特征，通过在多分辨率图信号上连续构建超边，动态学习高阶交互，实现自适应多尺度超边学习。

Result: 在多个脑网络基准数据集上，MuHL在不同疾病阶段均一致提升分类性能，并能从学习的超边中识别出与疾病进展相关的关键兴趣区域(ROIs)及其群体交互模式。

Conclusion: MuHL作为一种强大的脑网络分析工具，有效解决了高阶交互建模和灵活性不足的问题，对神经退行性疾病的早期分类和生物标志物发现具有重要价值。

Abstract: Understanding complex interactions between brain regions is critical for early neurodegenerative disease classification such as Alzheimer's Disease (AD) and Parkinson's Disease (PD). While graph-based models are widely used to analyze brain networks, most existing approaches primarily focus on pairwise interactions between directly connected nodes, limiting their ability to capture higher-order dependencies across multiple regions. Although hypergraph-based methods have been proposed to model higher-order relations, many rely on predefined hyperedges or restrict learning to hyperedge weights, reducing flexibility and limiting their capacity to capture multi-resolution structural patterns. In this regard, we introduce an adaptive multi-scale hyperedge learning framework, i.e., MuHL, which constructs hierarchical node features and dynamically learns high-order interactions through continuous hyperedge construction over multi-resolution graph signals. Extensive experiments on multiple brain network benchmarks demonstrate that MuHL consistently improves disease classification performance across different stages, and further identifies key regions of interest (ROIs) and their group-wise interactions from the learned hyperedges that are associated with disease progression, highlighting its potential as a powerful tool for brain network analysis in neurodegenerative disorders.

</details>


### [382] [A Graph Foundation Model with Spectral Parsing and Prototype-Guided Spatial Propagation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03315)
*Ankang Yang,Jitao Zhao,Dongxiao He,Liang Yang,Di Jin,Weixiong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SPG，一种基于频谱解析和原型引导空间传播的图基础模型，通过可学习的Chebyshev滤波器分解节点特征为多频谱响应，并利用Gromov-Wasserstein原型几何蒸馏跨图可迁移的成对关系，实现跨域泛化提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图基础模型在跨图迁移时面临两大挑战：1）图结构多样性导致拓扑感知设计受限，离散结构token和预定义子结构（如树、环）覆盖范围有限，无法捕获丰富的跨图关系模式；2）图信号包含高频局部模式和低频平滑模式，需要不同的传播行为，但现有方法未从频谱角度解耦这些纠缠成分。

Method: 1）频谱解析：使用可学习的Chebyshev滤波器将节点特征分解为多个频谱响应，减少特定频率图信号与传播行为之间的错配。2）原型引导空间传播：构建Gromov-Wasserstein原型几何，将超越预定义子结构的可迁移成对关系蒸馏到共享结构空间中，并将学到的原型几何投影回作为原型引导的传播算子。

Result: 跨域泛化实验表明，SPG在多个基准上取得一致性的性能提升。

Conclusion: 通过频谱解析解耦图信号中的不同频率成分，并借助原型几何捕获更丰富的跨图结构关系，SPG有效解决了现有图基础模型在拓扑迁移上的局限，为构建通用图基础模型提供了新思路。

Abstract: Graph foundation models aim to learn transferable knowledge from diverse graphs for generalization to unseen graphs and tasks. Unlike text and images, graphs lack a shared vocabulary or regular spatial grid, making cross-graph transfer challenging. This challenge comes from both feature discrepancies and, more critically, diverse graph structures. Existing GFMs mainly improve transferability by unifying feature spaces or incorporating structural tokens and vocabularies. However, existing topology-aware designs still have limitations. Structural tokens are usually discrete, while structural vocabularies often rely on predefined substructures such as trees and cycles, whose limited coverage may miss richer relational patterns across graphs. Moreover, graph signals contain both high-frequency local patterns and smoother low-frequency patterns, which require different propagation behaviors. These components are often entangled in raw graph signals, while this spectral perspective is rarely explored in existing GFMs. To address these challenges, we propose SPG, a graph foundation model with spectral parsing and prototype-guided spatial propagation. SPG applies learnable Chebyshev filters to decompose node features into multiple spectral responses, reducing the mismatch between frequency-specific graph signals and propagation behaviors. It then constructs a Gromov-Wasserstein prototype geometry to distill transferable pairwise relations beyond predefined substructures into a shared structural space. The learned prototype geometry is further projected back as a prototype-guided propagation operator. Experiments demonstrate consistent improvements in cross-domain generalization.

</details>


### [383] [Validation-Gated Multi-Agent Governance for Online Adaptation of Thermal-Hydraulic Surrogate Models under Operating-Regime Shift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03321)
*Doyeong Lim,Seungyoon Lee,In Cheol Bang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种受保护的持续适应框架，通过角色分离的多智能体系统（监控、诊断、适应、安全审计、编排器）和确定性冠军-挑战者门控机制，实现了热工水力实验数据的在线代理模型自适应更新，MA-Full模式相比静态部署将平均绝对误差降低19.0%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统AI代理模型在离线训练后部署到未知工况时，性能会退化（condition-locked），缺乏在线自适应能力，无法保障安全关键的热工水力预测的可靠性。

Method: 提出Guardian框架，包含五个角色分离的智能体（Monitor, Diagnosis, Adaptation, Safety-Auditor, Orchestrator）协同工作，配合确定性冠军-挑战者门控和后台影子学习机制，实现模型替换的可审计演进。采用时序傅里叶神经算子作为初始冠军模型，在60秒历史预测10秒轨迹的任务上进行验证。

Result: 静态部署MAE为7.06，告警超限率56.8%；基于规则的自适应将MAE降至6.54；MA-Full多智能体协作模式达到最低MAE 5.72和35.8%超限率，相较静态提升19.0%。验证了从神经算子到Transformer和GNN的有效模型升级。

Conclusion: 所提出的门控自适应框架能够支持可审计的代理模型持续演化，同时保持确定性门控对部署决策的最终控制权，为安全关键领域的在线模型更新提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Artificial-intelligence surrogates can support second-by-second thermal-hydraulic forecasting, but models selected and frozen offline may become condition-locked once deployed outside their pretraining envelope. This study develops a guarded continual-adaptation framework for experimental thermal-hydraulic loop data in which role-separated agents - Monitor, Diagnosis, Adaptation, Safety-Auditor, and Orchestrator - diagnose error signatures, prioritize candidate model families, and review promotions, while deterministic champion-challenger gates and background shadow learning retain final authority over model replacement. Seven surrogate families were screened by blocked three-fold cross-validation, and a temporal Fourier neural operator was selected as the initial champion for 60-s-history-to-10-s-trajectory forecasting on two held-out transients, with three seeds per adaptive mode. Static deployment gave a channel-averaged MAE of 7.06 and a 56.8% warning-exceedance ratio; rule-based adaptation reduced MAE to 6.54, whereas shadow refresh alone remained close to Static. The MA-Full mode, in which the role-separated multi-agent council reviews every evaluated stream step, achieved the lowest mean error, 5.72, and 35.8% exceedance, corresponding to a 19.0% improvement over Static. Paired bootstrap intervals against Static excluded zero, although intervals among adaptive modes overlapped and the six paired units limit broad statistical claims. Validated promotions from the neural operator to Transformer and graph neural network indicate that logged, gate-controlled adaptation can support auditable surrogate evolution while deterministic gates retain deployment authority.

</details>


### [384] [Multi-Modal Graph Neural Network with Transformer-Guided Adaptive Diffusion for Preclinical Alzheimer Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03322)
*Jaeyoon Sim,Minjae Lee,Guorong Wu,Won Hwa Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一个融合图扩散与Transformer的框架（Diffusion-Transformer），用于处理脑网络图数据，在阿尔茨海默病早期分类任务上取得优异表现，并能识别关键脑区。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN在处理脑网络时存在局限性：卷积方法难以聚合远邻域信息，注意力方法在捕获节点中心信息（特别是关键节点的特征保留）方面存在不足，难以从多模态特征中识别疾病特异性变异。

Method: 提出一种集成框架：通过扩散核（diffusion-kernel）聚合图的短程和长程信息，并利用下游Transformer的多头注意力机制进一步处理每个节点的扩散过程，从而实现全局与局部的有效融合。

Result: 在临床前阿尔茨海默病分类任务中，使用多种模态数据均取得了优越的性能提升。

Conclusion: 该模型能够准确识别与AD临床前阶段密切相关的关键ROI脑区，为早期诊断和疾病预测提供了重要潜力。

Abstract: The graphical representation of the brain offers critical insights into diagnosing and prognosing neurodegenerative disease via relationships between regions of interest (ROIs). Despite recent emergence of various Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) to effectively capture the relational information, there remain inherent limitations in interpreting the brain networks. Specifically, convolutional approaches ineffectively aggregate information from distant neighborhoods, while attention-based methods exhibit deficiencies in capturing node-centric information, particularly in retaining critical characteristics from pivotal nodes. These shortcomings reveal challenges for identifying disease-specific variation from diverse features from different modalities. In this regard, we propose an integrated framework guiding diffusion process at each node by a downstream transformer where both short- and long-range properties of graphs are aggregated via diffusion-kernel and multi-head attention respectively. We demonstrate the superiority of our model by improving performance of pre-clinical Alzheimer's disease (AD) classification with various modalities. Also, our model adeptly identifies key ROIs that are closely associated with the preclinical stages of AD, marking a significant potential for early diagnosis and prevision of the disease.

</details>


### [385] [Calibration Data Trade-offs Across Capability Dimensions: Why Multi-Source Mixing Matters for High-Sparsity LLM Pruning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03328)
*Hu Xu,Zhaolong Xing,Congcong Liu,Jiaxing Wang,Zhida Jiang,Junshi Huang,Zhen Chen,Jianfeng Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对大语言模型后训练剪枝中校准数据影响的研究，发现不同能力维度（通用、常识、代码、数学）存在正负相反的权衡效应，并提出多源校准混合方法IGSP，显著提升剪枝后性能保留率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 已有研究认为校准数据来源对剪枝后平均精度影响不大，但本文质疑该结论是否在被细分为不同能力维度时仍然成立，旨在揭示校准数据与各维度能力保留之间的真实关系。

Method: 将后剪枝能力分解为通用、常识、代码、数学四个维度，使用15个校准源进行OIT信息度量与各维度保留率的Spearman相关分析；提出IGSP（信息引导自校准协议），通过最小化4-gram聚合和平衡各维度困惑度来自动构建多源校准集。

Result: 校准困惑度与通用保留正相关（ρ=+0.71），但与数学（ρ=-0.53）和代码（ρ=-0.59）保留负相关。在LLaMA-3.1-8B的SparseGPT 60%稀疏度下，均匀多源混合达58.8%总保留率，超过最佳单源（MetaMath 50.0%）+8.8，超过C4默认（40.0%）+18.8；IGSP比Self-Cal提升+2.4，比SGS提升+4.8。

Conclusion: 校准数据对剪枝后不同能力维度存在显著异质性影响，无法通过单一源保留所有能力；多源校准混合是有效解决方案，IGSP可自动化实现无需能力对齐语料库的多源构建。

Abstract: Post-training pruning compresses large language models to high sparsity using a small unlabelled calibration set, and recent work has concluded that the choice of calibration source has only modest impact on averaged post-pruning accuracy. We ask whether this conclusion survives once calibration impact is evaluated separately across distinct capability dimensions rather than aggregated. Decomposing post-pruning capability into General, Commonsense, Code, and Math, and analysing $n{=}15$ calibration sources via Spearman correlations between OIT information metrics and per-dimension retention, we uncover an opposite-sign trade-off: calibration perplexity correlates positively with General retention ($ρ{=}{+}0.71$) but negatively with Math and Code retention ($ρ{=}{-}0.53,\,{-}0.59$; $p{<}0.05$), so no single source can preserve all capabilities. We respond with multi-source calibration mixing, and propose IGSP, an information-guided self-calibration protocol that automates multi-source construction without capability-aligned corpora by minimising 4-gram aggregation and balancing perplexity across dimensions. On LLaMA-3.1-8B at SparseGPT 60% sparsity, a uniform multi-source mix reaches 58.8% total retention, outperforming the best single source (MetaMath, 50.0%) by $+8.8$ and the C4 default (40.0%) by $+18.8$; IGSP improves over Self-Cal by $+2.4$ and SGS by $+4.8$.

</details>


### [386] [FLIPS: Instance-Fingerprinting for LLMs via Pseudo-random Sequences](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03330)
*Gurvan Richardeau,Gohar Dashyan,Erwan Le Merrer,Gilles Tredan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出实例级指纹识别技术FLIPS，用于区分同一LLM不同配置（如提示词、采样参数、量化设置）生成的输出，在237个模型实例上达到96%封闭集和90%开放集准确率，远超基线方法，为AI监管提供了新手段。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM识别技术（如指纹识别）侧重于知识产权保护，追求对实例级参数（提示词、采样配置、量化等）的鲁棒性。然而LLM的行为不仅取决于原始权重，还依赖于这些实例级参数——同一模型在不同配置下可能产生截然不同的安全输出或毒性内容。这对AI监管构成挑战，因为合规评估应针对实际部署的行为，而非模型来源。

Method: 提出FLIPS方法，利用LLM在生成二进制随机序列时存在的固有偏差，构建实例级指纹。通过分析不同配置下模型输出的统计特征差异，实现配置级别的识别。支持封闭集（已知全部目标）和开放集（存在未知目标）两种场景。

Result: 在237个模型实例上，FLIPS达到96%封闭集识别准确率和90%开放集识别准确率，而改编的LLMmap基线方法仅为35%。

Conclusion: 实例级指纹识别对于AI监管不仅是必要的，而且是切实可行的。该方法可有效区分同一LLM的不同配置，为监管机构评估模型实际部署行为提供了技术支撑。

Abstract: Literature reveals that a Large Language Model's (LLM) behavior is not only conditioned by its original weights but also its instance-level parameters, such as instructional prompt, sampling configuration or quantization. A model that generates safe outputs under one configuration may produce toxic content under another. However, current LLM identification techniques (such as fingerprinting) focus on intellectual property protection, and their design favors robustness to changes in these instance-level parameters. This poses a critical challenge for AI regulation in which compliance assessments target actual deployed behaviors, not model provenance. In this paper, we introduce instance-level fingerprinting, a regulator-oriented paradigm that distinguishes configurations of the same LLM. Our method FLIPS, exploits biases in generated binary random sequences to reach 96% (closed-set) and 90% (open-set, where some targets are unknown) identification accuracy across 237 model instances, versus 35% for the adapted LLMmap baseline. This shows that instance-level fingerprinting is both necessary for regulation and practically feasible. Code available at https://github.com/GurvanR/FLIPS-LLM-Instance-Fingerprinting.

</details>


### [387] [Tailoring Strictly Proper Scoring Rules for Downstream Tasks: An Application to Causal Inference](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03332)
*Roman Plaud,Alexandre Perez-Lebel,Antoine Saillenfest,Thomas Bonald,Marine Le Morvan,Gaël Varoquaux,Matthieu Labeau*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种通过匹配下游误差度量局部曲率来推导任务特定严格适当评分规则的框架，应用于因果推断中的平均处理效应估计，推导出闭式损失函数和对应的概率映射，实验表明优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 概率模型使用任务无关的目标函数（如log-loss）训练，会导致下游估计的显著误差。在因果推断的逆概率加权（IPW）中，倾向性得分在0和1附近的误差会导致高偏差和高方差，亟需任务特定的训练目标。

Method: 提出一个原则性框架，通过匹配下游误差度量的局部曲率来推导任务特定的严格适当评分规则；针对ATE估计推导出闭式损失函数及其对应的规范概率映射，可无缝集成到神经网络或梯度提升等任意模型中。

Result: 在因果推断基准上的大量评估表明，所提出的定制目标函数在性能上始终优于标准基于似然的方法和协变量平衡方法。

Conclusion: 任务特定的评分规则能有效缓解传统任务无关目标函数在下游任务中的误差问题，尤其适用于因果推断中倾向性得分的极端值场景。

Abstract: Probabilistic models are typically trained using task-agnostic objectives like log-loss, which can lead to significant errors in downstream estimation. This disconnect is especially critical in Inverse Probability Weighting (IPW) for causal inference, where propensity score errors near $0$ and $1$ often lead to high bias and variance. We propose a principled framework for deriving task-specific strictly proper scoring rules by matching the local curvature of the downstream error metric. We apply this to the Average Treatment Effect (ATE) estimation, deriving a closed-form loss and its corresponding canonical probability mapping that can be readily integrated with any model like a neural network or a gradient boosting algorithm. Extensive evaluations on causal inference benchmarks demonstrate that our tailored objective consistently outperforms standard likelihood-based and covariate-balancing approaches.

</details>


### [388] [IdEst: Assessing Self-Supervised Learning Representations via Intrinsic Dimension](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03338)
*Julie Mordacq,Vicky Kalogeiton,Steve Oudot*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出IdEst方法，利用最小生成树维度估计器（dim_MST）来估算自监督学习（SSL）表示的本征维度（ID），发现其与线性探测性能高度相关，并能高效进行超参数选择，显著降低计算成本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准SSL评估方法（线性探测）计算成本高、对超参数敏感，且难以揭示表示空间的几何结构。受神经网络泛化与本征维度之间联系的启发，作者希望找到一种更高效、更具几何洞察力的评估代理指标。

Method: 提出IdEst方法，使用最小生成树维度估计器（dim_MST）来估计SSL表示的本征维度（ID），并在多种数据集、架构和SSL预训练目标上验证其与下游线性探测性能的相关性。

Result: IdEst与线性探测性能高度相关；能够高效进行超参数选择，显著降低计算成本。

Conclusion: 本征维度可作为评估SSL表示的一种有原则的几何代理指标，补充标准的监督探测协议。

Abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for learning meaningful representations from unlabeled data. However, the standard protocol for evaluating these representations, linear probing, is computationally expensive, sensitive to hyperparameters, and provides limited insight into the geometric structure of the representation space. In this work, motivated by connections between neural network generalization and intrinsic dimension (ID) we propose IdEst, a method for estimating the ID of SSL representations via the Minimum Spanning Tree dimension estimator ($\mathrm{dim}_\mathrm{MST}$). Across diverse datasets, architectures, and SSL pretraining objectives, we show that IdEst strongly correlates with downstream linear probe performances. Furthermore, we demonstrate that IdEst enables efficient hyperparameter selection, significantly reducing the computational cost compared to supervised alternatives. Our results highlight intrinsic dimensionality as a principled geometric proxy for assessing SSL representations, complementing standard supervised probing protocols.

</details>


### [389] [AugMask: Training Diffusion Models on Incomplete Tabular Data via Stochastic Augmentation and Masking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03347)
*Jungkyu Kim,Taeyoung Park,Kibok Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出AugMask框架，通过条件随机增强和仅对观测坐标去噪监督，使扩散模型能处理含缺失值的表格数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的扩散模型骨干要求完全指定的输入，而真实表格数据常含缺失值，现有方法缺乏有效的处理手段。

Method: 1) 利用轻量辅助模型对缺失条目进行条件随机增强以构造数值输入；2) 仅对观测坐标施加去噪监督，将增强后的缺失条目视为不确定的条件上下文而非训练目标。

Result: 在多种数据集和缺失模式上，标准的扩散表格生成器结合AugMask后性能超越专门处理缺失的基线方法。

Conclusion: AugMask是一种即插即用的训练框架，通过分离条件与监督，使对缺失值不敏感的骨干网络有效适应不完整数据。

Abstract: Score-based diffusion models have emerged as prominent deep generative models; however, their application to tabular data remains challenging because their backbones assume fully specified inputs, whereas real-world tabular data often contain missing values. We propose AugMask, a plug-and-play training framework that adapts missing-unaware backbones to incomplete data by separating conditioning from supervision. AugMask 1) constructs numeric inputs via conditional stochastic augmentation using lightweight auxiliary models, and 2) applies denoising supervision only to observed coordinates. In effect, augmented missing entries serve as uncertain conditioning context rather than training targets. We connect this training rule to a Rao--Blackwellized objective and show that marginalizing missing entries yields a variance-weighted sensitivity penalty, discouraging over-reliance on uncertain completions. Across diverse datasets and missingness regimes, AugMask enables standard diffusion-based tabular generators to outperform specialized missing-aware baselines.

</details>


### [390] [APIC: Amortized Physics-Informed Calibration using Neural Processes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03355)
*Aishwarya Venkataramanan,Sai Karthikeya Vemuri,Joachim Denzler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出APIC框架，将Kennedy-O'Hagan校准方法扩展为可扩展的群体级推断，利用神经过程实现跨系统实例的高效贝叶斯校准与不确定性量化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统KOH框架因逐实例、非摊销的形式难以扩展至相关系统族，缺乏可伸缩的群体级推断能力。

Method: 提出APIC，采用双分支潜在架构——分离实例特定物理参数与共享的结构性差异，结合可微物理模型与摊销推理后端（神经过程），实现从稀疏观测中快速校准未见实例。

Result: 在阻尼弹簧振子、Lotka-Volterra系统、对流扩散PDE三个测试中，APIC在参数恢复与系统性差异识别上优于其他校准方法。

Conclusion: APIC有效实现了群体级物理校准的摊销化，兼顾可扩展性与不确定性量化，为物理模型修正提供了新范式。

Abstract: Physics models are inherently imperfect due to misspecified or missing mechanisms, resulting in systematic discrepancies between model predictions and real-world observations. The Kennedy-O'Hagan (KOH) framework addresses this issue through explicit discrepancy modeling. However, its non-amortized, per-instance formulation limits scalability across families of related systems. We introduce Amortized Physics-Informed Calibration (APIC), a population-level extension of KOH that leverages Neural Processes to perform scalable Bayesian inference across realizations. Our framework employs a two-branch latent architecture to disentangle instance-specific physical parameters from shared, state-dependent structural discrepancies. By integrating differentiable physics into an amortized inference backbone, APIC enables rapid calibration of unseen realizations from sparse observations while quantifying uncertainty. Experiments on the damped spring oscillator, the Lotka-Volterra system, and the advection-diffusion PDE with misspecified physics demonstrate improved parameter recovery and consistent identification of the systemic discrepancy structure compared to other calibration approaches.

</details>


### [391] [WUSH: Near-Optimal Adaptive Transforms for LLM Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.00956)
*Jiale Chen,Vage Egiazarian,Roberto L. Castro,Torsten Hoefler,Dan Alistarh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出WUSH，一种结合Hadamard变换与数据依赖的二阶矩成分的非正交变换，用于权值-激活联合量化，理论上可证明在FP和INT量化器下接近最优，并在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上取得W4A4精度提升（MXFP4下+2.8平均点），同时实现最高5.8倍吞吐加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于Hadamard旋转等变换的量化缓解方法是固定的、数据无关的，其对量化的最优性尚不明确。本文旨在推导出面向权值-激活联合量化的闭合形式最优线性块变换。

Method: 在RTN AbsMax缩放块量化器下，推导出闭合形式的最优线性块变换WUSH，其由Hadamard骨干网络与数据依赖的二阶矩成分组合构成非正交变换，并设计了高效的融合GPU实现。

Result: 在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct的W4A4量化中，WUSH在MXFP4格式下相比最强Hadamard基线，RTN提升+2.8平均点，GPTQ提升+0.7；FP4 MatMul实现最高5.8倍单层吞吐。

Conclusion: WUSH在理论和实验层面均证明了数据依赖的非正交变换相比固定Hadamard旋转在权值-激活量化中的优越性，且高效实现使其具备实际部署价值。

Abstract: Quantizing LLM weights and activations is a standard approach for efficient deployment, but a few extreme outliers can stretch the dynamic range and amplify low-bit quantization errors. Prior transform-based mitigations (e.g., Hadamard rotations) are fixed and data-agnostic, and their optimality for quantization has remained unclear. We derive closed-form optimal linear blockwise transforms for joint weight-activation quantization under standard RTN AbsMax-scaled block quantizers, covering both integer and floating-point formats. The resulting construction, WUSH, combines a Hadamard backbone with a data-dependent second-moment component to form a non-orthogonal transform that is provably near-optimal for FP and INT quantizers under mild assumptions while admitting an efficient fused GPU implementation. Empirically, WUSH improves W4A4 accuracy over the strongest Hadamard-based baselines (e.g., on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct in MXFP4, it gains +2.8 average points with RTN and +0.7 with GPTQ) while delivering up to 5.8$\times$ per-layer throughput over BF16 via FP4 MatMul. Source code is available at https://github.com/IST-DASLab/WUSH.

</details>


### [392] [The Impact of Temporal Granularity on Socio-Demographic Inference from Household Load Profiles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03358)
*Dejan Radovanovic,Maximilian Schirl,Andreas Unterweger,Günther Eibl*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了智能电表数据时间粒度（15分钟到7天）对推断家庭社会经济属性准确性的影响，发现存在两个性能平台期（15分钟-1小时和1-7天），并提出数据最小化策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然已知智能电表数据可泄露用户隐私，但时间分辨率如何影响推断性能尚未被充分探索，本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 基于1,589户家庭一年的数据，构建评估框架：在全年数据上训练分类器，但在任意周数据上测试，强制模型泛化；对比多种时间粒度（15分钟至7天）、特征提取方法（手工特征、tsfresh特征、CNN自编码器嵌入）和分类器（XGBoost等）。

Result: 1) 时间粒度变粗会降低预测精度，但存在两个性能平台期（15分钟-1小时和1-7天）；2) 可解释的手工特征和tsfresh特征与CNN自编码器嵌入竞争力相当，XGBoost表现最优；3) 静态属性（如住宅面积）可从粗粒度数据推断，动态属性（如游泳池使用）需要细粒度信号。

Conclusion: 本研究揭示了智能电表数据中时间分辨率、特征提取和分类器选择如何共同影响隐私-效用权衡，为数据最小化提供了新见解。

Abstract: Smart meter data can reveal sensitive socio-demographic characteristics of households, raising privacy concerns. While this risk has been demonstrated at fixed granularities, the role of temporal resolution in shaping inference performance remains insufficiently explored. This paper addresses this gap by analyzing how load profiles with granularities from 15 minutes to 7 days affect the predictability of eight socio-demographic attributes in a dataset of 1,589 households over one year. We introduce an evaluation framework where classifiers are trained on year-round data but tested on arbitrary weeks, forcing generalization across seasonal and weekly variations. Our results show three main findings. First, while coarsening granularity reduces predictive accuracy, two plateaus emerge: performance is stable between 15 minutes and 1 hour, and again between 1 and 7 days. This reveals opportunities for data minimization without sacrificing utility. Second, interpretable handcrafted and tsfresh features remain competitive with CNN-based autoencoder embeddings, while XGBoost consistently outperforms alternative classifiers. Third, feature importance analysis highlights differences between static and dynamic attributes: dwelling size can be inferred even from coarse data, whereas swimming pool usage requires fine-grained temporal signals. Overall, our study provides new insights into the privacy-utility trade-off in smart metering, showing how temporal resolution, feature extraction, and classifier choice jointly influence socio-demographic inference.

</details>


### [393] [Mitigating False Credit Propagation: Probabilistic Graphical Reward Aggregation for Rubric-Based Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03361)
*Can Lv,Mingju Chen,Heng Chang,Shiji Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GEAR框架，用概率图模型解决基于rubric的奖励聚合中"虚假信用传播"(FCP)问题——即无视准则间前置/激活关系，导致奖励错误传播。实验表明GEAR在多个基准上优于传统平局聚合和确定性门控方法，相对提升最高15.5%，FCP泄漏减少96.5%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于rubric的奖励聚合方法将各准则得分视为独立效用进行标量加和，忽略了准则间存在的前置条件(pre-requisite)和激活关系(activation relations)，导致奖励或惩罚在条件未满足时仍被错误计入，即False Credit Propagation (FCP)问题。

Method: 提出GEAR框架：将每个准则结果建模为潜在伯努利事件，构建带类型的rubric图；通过概率传播实现子事件对未满足父事件的软抑制，最终将归一化期望符号效用作为奖励值。计算复杂度为线性时间，可无缝嵌入标准rubric-based RL流程。

Result: 在HealthBench、WritingBench、PLawBench三个基准上，使用两个策略骨干网络，GEAR一致优于平局聚合和确定性门控方法，相对提升最高15.5%；FCP诊断显示GEAR泄漏减少96.5%，同时保留更多许可下游效用。

Conclusion: GEAR通过概率图建模rubric准则间的依赖关系，有效解决了虚假信用传播问题，在保持高效计算的同时显著提升奖励聚合质量，代码已开源。

Abstract: Rubric-based rewards are increasingly used for open-ended language model post-training, but criterion-level scores are often aggregated as independent utilities. This flat scalarization ignores rubric-specified prerequisite and activation relations among criteria, allowing reward or penalty to be counted even when the condition that licenses it is absent. We call this structural reward-aggregation failure \textbf{False Credit Propagation} (FCP). To address this limitation, we propose \ourname (\textbf{G}raphical \textbf{E}vent \textbf{A}ggregation for \textbf{R}ubric rewards), a probabilistic graphical framework for dependency-aware rubric aggregation. \ourname models each criterion outcome as a latent Bernoulli event in a typed rubric graph, propagates soft suppression from unsupported parent events to their children, and aggregates the resulting event probabilities into a normalized expected signed utility. This yields a linear-time reward computation that can be plugged into standard rubric-based RL pipelines without changing the outer optimization algorithm. Experiments on HealthBench, WritingBench, and PLawBench with two policy backbones show that \ourname consistently improves over flat aggregation and deterministic gating, achieving relative gains of up to 15.5\% over flat aggregation. FCP diagnostics further show that \ourname reduces leakage by 96.5\% relative to flat aggregation while preserving more licensed downstream utility than deterministic gating. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/LvCan926/GEAR.

</details>


### [394] [Link Prediction or Perdition: the Seeds of Instability in Knowledge Graph Embeddings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03365)
*Guillaume Méroué,Fabien Gandon,Pierre Monnin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了知识图谱嵌入模型在标准评估协议中被忽视的稳定性问题，发现高性能模型在三元组预测和嵌入空间组织上存在显著的不稳定性，且投票机制只能提供有限的稳定性提升，对当前基准测试协议的可信度提出质疑。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准评估协议（如MRR、Hits@K）忽略了随机种子对结果稳定性的影响，且这些指标掩盖了单个预测和嵌入空间组织中的潜在不稳定性。

Method: 对多种知识图谱嵌入模型在多个数据集上进行系统性稳定性分析，通过隔离随机因素（初始化、三元组排序、负采样、dropout、硬件）来独立评估各因素对不稳定的贡献程度。

Result: 高性能模型在三元组级别产生分歧预测，且嵌入空间高度可变；各随机因素独立诱导出相当程度的不稳定性；更好的MRR超参数配置并不能保证更稳定；投票机制对稳定性的提升有限。

Conclusion: 当前基准测试协议存在关键局限性，对知识图谱嵌入模型在知识图谱补全中的可靠性提出担忧。

Abstract: Embedding models (KGEMs) constitute the main link prediction approach to complete knowledge graphs. Standard evaluation protocols emphasize rank-based metrics such as MRR or Hits@$K$, but usually overlook the influence of random seeds on result stability. Moreover, these metrics conceal potential instabilities in individual predictions and in the organization of embedding spaces. In this work, we conduct a systematic stability analysis of multiple KGEMs across several datasets. We find that high-performance models actually produce divergent predictions at the triple level and highly variable embedding spaces. By isolating stochastic factors (i.e., initialization, triple ordering, negative sampling, dropout, hardware), we show that each independently induces instability of comparable magnitude. Furthermore, for a given model, hyperparameter configurations with better MRR are not guaranteed to be more stable. Moreover, voting, albeit a known remediation mechanism, only provides a limited enhancement of stability. These findings highlight critical limitations of current benchmarking protocols, and raise concerns about the reliability of KGEMs for knowledge graph completion.

</details>


### [395] [Local Guidance, Global Impact: Gaussian-Reshaped Trust Region Unlocks Behavior Transitions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03382)
*Bingxu Liu,Jiashun Liu,Johan Obando-Ceron,Hao Wang,Runze Liu,Pablo Samuel Castro,Aaron Courville,Ling Pan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 论文提出高斯信任域策略优化（GTR），通过非单调、有界的高斯核重塑信任域，解决PPO在非平稳环境下策略更新方向效率低、难以适应新行为模式的问题，在游戏、机器人控制、开放世界探索和语言模型后训练中均取得优异表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准PPO在非平稳/持续学习环境中表现不佳，其失败并非源于模型容量或裁剪限制，而是因为缺乏几何感知引导，导致局部更新方向效率低、难以积累有意义的行为变化。基于散度的正则化虽有部分几何感知，但单调递增的惩罚隐含地抑制了必要的大幅策略偏移。

Method: 提出高斯信任域策略优化（GTR），用高斯核重塑信任域，使约束有界且非单调——近处提供强局部稳定性，远处在持续高优势更新下逐步放松。进一步引入混合高斯锚点（Mixture Gaussian Anchor），根据近期策略轨迹自适应调整，减少陈旧参考带来的方差。

Result: GTR在游戏、模拟机器人控制、开放世界探索、语言模型后训练等多个领域均达到强性能，且架构无关。

Conclusion: 几何感知的信任域设计是解决复杂非平稳环境下鲁棒强化学习的一个有前景的方向。

Abstract: While Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) demonstrates strong performance in stationary settings, we show that its standard optimization paradigm struggles in continual and non-stationary environments. The failure does not stem from insufficient model capacity or overly restrictive clipping. Instead, PPO performs persistent, directionally inefficient local updates, which indicates a lack of geometry-aware guidance for accumulating meaningful behavioral change and ultimately hindering transitions toward new behavior patterns. Although divergence-based regularization introduces partial geometric awareness, its monotonically increasing penalties implicitly discourage large policy deviations, even when such shifts are necessary for effective adaptation. To address this limitation, we propose Gaussian Trust Region Policy Optimization (GTR), which reshapes the trust region using a Gaussian kernel. The resulting constraint is bounded and non-monotonic, providing strong local stability while progressively relaxing under sustained high-advantage updates. To further improve robustness, we introduce a Mixture Gaussian Anchor that adapts to recent policy trajectories, reducing variance induced by stale references. GTR is architecture-agnostic and achieves strong performance across games, simulated robotic control, open-world exploration, and language model post-training. These results demonstrate that geometry-aware trust-region design can be a promising direction for robust reinforcement learning in complex non-stationary environments. Our code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/GTR_demo/README.md.

</details>


### [396] [When Model Merging Breaks Routing: Training-Free Calibration for MoE](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03391)
*Canbin Huang,Tianyuan Shi,Xiaojun Quan,Jingang Wang,Jianfei Zhang,Qifan Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HARC框架，利用二阶曲率信息校准合并后的MoE路由器，解决路由崩溃问题，提升混合专家模型合并性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有模型合并技术（如线性参数算术或优化方法）在应用于混合专家（MoE）架构时效果不佳，因为合并会导致路由崩溃——路由器无法将token分发给合适的专家，从而造成严重性能下降。

Method: 提出Hessian-Aware Router Calibration (HARC)，一种免训练框架，利用二阶曲率信息重新对齐合并后的路由器，通过无矩阵共轭梯度法求解闭式解。

Result: 在数学推理和代码生成任务上，HARC有效缓解了多种MoE合并基线中的路由崩溃问题，并带来显著的性能提升。

Conclusion: HARC是一种高效、免训练的MoE路由器校准方法，能有效解决合并中的路由崩溃问题，提升多LLM能力整合的效果。

Abstract: Model merging has emerged as a cost-effective approach for consolidating the capabilities of multiple LLMs without retraining. However, existing merging techniques, largely based on linear parameter arithmetic or optimization, struggle when applied to Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures. We identify a critical failure mode in MoE merging, termed routing breakdown, in which the merged router fails to dispatch tokens to suitable experts. Routing breakdown stems from the sensitivity of the non-linear softmax and discrete Top-k routing mechanisms to parameter perturbations from merging, a sensitivity further amplified by load-balancing constraints imposed during MoE pretraining. Because fine-tuned experts exhibit distinct specializations, even modest misrouting can cause severe performance degradation. To address this issue, we propose Hessian-Aware Router Calibration (HARC), a training-free framework that leverages second-order curvature information to realign the merged router. This approach admits a closed-form solution that can be efficiently solved using a matrix-free conjugate gradient method. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and code generation tasks show that HARC effectively mitigates routing breakdown across diverse MoE merging baselines and leads to substantial performance improvements. Our code is available at https://github.com/huangcb01/HARC.

</details>


### [397] [Flicker-DDPM: Accelerating Denoising Diffusion via 1/f Colored Noise Injection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03393)
*Kexiang Mao*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Flicker-DDPM，用1/f彩色噪声替代高斯白噪声，加速扩散模型采样3.33倍，同时保持生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自然图像功率谱遵循1/k^α规律，而标准DDPM使用各向同性白噪声（均匀频谱）与自然图像统计特性不匹配，导致采样效率低。

Method: 1) 基于空间相关核σ(d)=(d+1)^{-η}构建彩色噪声模块，通过调节η控制1/f^α噪声的谱指数α；2) 开发频域线性理论，证明谱匹配的彩色噪声可线性化反向轨迹。

Result: CIFAR-10上，Flicker-DDPM用原始DDPM 1/3.33的采样步数达到或超越其生成质量，且每步额外计算成本可忽略。

Conclusion: 自然界常见的1/f噪声（自组织临界性）可有效用于扩散模型，通过谱匹配加速采样，为去噪过程的设计提供了新范式。

Abstract: We propose a novel diffusion model, Flicker-DDPM, which incorporates flicker (1/f) noise inspired by self-organized criticality (SOC), a widely observed phenomenon in natural systems. Unlike denoising diffusion probabilistic models (DDPMs), which employ isotropic white noise in the forward process, Flicker-DDPM adopts colored noise with power-law spectra to better match the spectral statistics of natural images, whose power spectra typically follow P(k) proportional to 1/k^α. To this end, we develop a colored-noise module based on a spatial correlation kernel, σ(d) = (d + 1)^{-η}, and theoretically establish that adjusting η controls the spectral exponent α of the generated 1/fα noise, enabling adaptation to datasets with diverse spectral characteristics. On CIFAR-10, Flicker DDPM matches or surpasses the generation quality of a standard DDPM baseline using 3.33 times fewer sampling steps, with negligible additional computational cost per step. We further develop a frequency-domain linear theory demonstrating that spectrally matched colored noise linearizes the reverse trajectory, theoretically explaining the observed sampling acceleration.

</details>


### [398] [KVarN: Variance-Normalized KV-Cache Quantization Mitigates Error Accumulation in Reasoning Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03458)
*Lorenz K. Muller,Philippe Bich,Chiara Boretti,Hyun-Min Chang,Jiawei Zhuang,Lukas Cavigelli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出KVarN，一种免校准的KV缓存量化方法，通过Hadamard旋转和双尺度方差归一化解决长序列解码中量化误差累积问题，在2-bit精度下达到SOTA。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 测试时扩展在长序列解码中受限于KV缓存的内存瓶颈，现有量化方法在自回归解码下误差累积严重，主要由错误的token尺度导致。

Method: KVarN采用Hadamard旋转对K和V矩阵进行变换，再对两个轴进行双尺度方差归一化（dual-scaling variance normalization），无需校准数据。

Result: 在MATH500、AIME24和HumanEval等生成式基准测试上，2-bit精度下达到SOTA，显著减少误差累积。

Conclusion: KVarN有效解决了自回归解码中KV缓存量化的误差累积问题，验证了Hadamard旋转结合双尺度归一化的有效性，代码已开源。

Abstract: Test-time scaling is a powerful approach to obtain better reasoning in large language models, but it becomes memory-bottlenecked during long-horizon decoding, as the KV-cache grows. KV-cache quantization can help improve this, but current methods are evaluated under prefill-like settings and errors behave differently under autoregressive decoding. We show that in the latter regime, quantization errors accumulate across timesteps, driven primarily by incorrect token scales. We introduce KVarN, a calibration-free KV-cache quantizer that applies a Hadamard rotation followed by a dual-scaling variance normalization across both axes of the K and V matrices. We find that this combination fixes outlying token-scale errors and substantially reduces error accumulation over existing baselines. KVarN establishes a new state-of-theart for KV-cache quantization on generative benchmarks, including MATH500, AIME24 and HumanEval, at 2-bit precision. A vLLM implementation of the KVarN method is available at https://github.com/huawei-csl/KVarN

</details>


### [399] [Topology-Aware Gaussian Graph Repair for Robust Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03462)
*Anubha Goel,Juho Kanniainen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TAGR，一种轻量级图修复框架，通过自适应高斯核构建稀疏特征邻域图，并结合拓扑感知的残差校正来修复不完美的图结构，从而提升GNN在含噪和缺失边场景下的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图神经网络依赖图结构质量，但真实图常存在噪声边或缺失边。现有方法中，去边无法恢复缺失连接，而图结构学习则引入额外优化复杂度，因此需要一种轻量级的图修复方案。

Method: TAGR包含两个部分：1) 自适应高斯核构建稀疏特征邻域图，添加特征相似节点间的辅助边；2) 拓扑感知残差校正，根据局部特征和结构一致性保留并重新加权原始拓扑。修复后的图可直接用于标准GNN。

Result: 在基准引文网络上的实验表明，TAGR在噪声边和缺失边两种设置下均提升了GNN的鲁棒性。分析显示高斯特征邻域修复是鲁棒性提升的主要来源，拓扑感知残差校正则在图不完整时提高稳定性。

Conclusion: 通过轻量级稀疏图修复而非稠密图结构学习，即可有效实现图鲁棒性提升。

Abstract: Graph neural networks have achieved strong performance on graph-structured data, but their effectiveness depends heavily on the quality of the observed graph. In real applications, graph topology is often imperfect: noisy edges may connect unrelated nodes, while missing edges may prevent useful information from being propagated. Existing robust graph learning methods mainly address this problem by removing suspicious edges or by learning a new graph structure during training. However, edge removal alone cannot recover missing connections, and graph structure learning may introduce additional optimization complexity. In this paper, we propose Topology-Aware Gaussian Repair (TAGR), a simple graph repair framework for robust message passing in graph neural networks. Instead of learning a dense adjacency matrix, TAGR constructs a sparse feature-neighborhood graph using an adaptive Gaussian kernel and combines it with a topology-aware residual correction of the observed graph. The Gaussian repair component introduces auxiliary edges between feature-similar nodes, while the residual correction preserves and reweights the original topology according to local feature and structural consistency. The repaired graph can be used directly with standard graph neural networks without changing their architectures. Extensive experiments on benchmark citation networks show that TAGR improves the robustness of GNNs under both noisy-edge and missing-edge settings. The analysis further show that Gaussian feature-neighborhood repair provides the main robustness gain, while topology-aware residual correction improves stability when the observed graph is incomplete. These results suggest that effective graph robustness can be achieved through lightweight sparse graph repair rather than dense graph structure learning.

</details>


### [400] [Rethinking the Role of Tensor Decompositions in Post-Training LLM Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03465)
*Artur Zagitov,Alexander Miasnikov,Maxim Krutikov,Vladimir Aletov,Gleb Molodtsov,Nail Bashirov,Artem Tsedenov,Aleksandr Beznosikov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文系统评估了张量分解在大语言模型后训练压缩中的表现，发现其与异构表示存在根本性不匹配，限制了在大型部署中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有张量分解压缩方法仅在狭窄设置下评估，缺乏大规模部署下的系统性分析，需要明确其实际有效性和适用范围。

Method: 在密集和MoE架构上系统评估张量压缩，结合经验分析和理论分析，建立性能权衡关系。

Result: 张量分解假设的共享子空间与LLM学习的异构表示存在根本性不匹配，明确了其实际限制。

Conclusion: 张量分解在大规模部署中的角色需要重新审视，现有方法存在根本性局限。

Abstract: Post-training compression is essential for deploying large language models (LLMs) under tight resource constraints. Tensor decompositions have emerged as a promising direction, offering compact parameterizations well suited to Transformer weight structures. However, existing studies evaluate these methods in narrow settings, leaving unclear whether tensorization is effective at large-scale deployment. We systematically evaluate tensor compression across dense and MoE architectures, establishing performance trade-offs grounded in both empirical analysis and theoretical analysis. We identify a fundamental mismatch between the shared subspaces assumed by tensor decompositions and the heterogeneous representations learned by modern LLMs, thereby delineating their practical limits and clarifying their viable role in large-scale deployment. The code is available at https://github.com/brain-lab-research/TT-LLM.

</details>


### [401] [Analyzing Stream Collapse in Hyper-Connections: From Diagnosis to Mitigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03483)
*Ekaterina Alimaskina,Gleb Molodtsov,Aleksandr Beznosikov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了Hyper-Connections（HC）中多残差流的对称性如何被打破，发现流之间会形成主导流，残差混合常接近恒等映射，限制了流间信息交换，而通过初始化打破对称性可提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究Hyper-Connections中多流对称性在实际训练中是如何被解决的，即流是均衡专业化还是形成主导流，以及这种对称性对模型性能的影响。

Method: 基于细粒度诊断工具，对HC语言模型的多流表示进行追踪分析，研究残差混合、信号分布和特征可解释性；并提出在流初始化时打破对称性的改进方案。

Result: 发现（1）残差混合常接近恒等映射，限制了流间信息交换；（2）信号和可解释特征集中在单一主导流中，多流残差连接实际退化为单流；（3）初始化时打破对称性可减少主导行为并提升mHC变体的性能。

Conclusion: Hyper-Connections中的多流对称性在实践中会被"隐性打破"形成主导流，导致容量未充分利用；主动在初始化时打破对称性是一种有效的改进策略。

Abstract: Hyper-Connections (HC) replace the single Transformer residual stream with multiple streams, introducing a permutation symmetry over stream indices. We study how this symmetry is resolved in practice: whether streams specialize in a balanced way or exhibit dominant-stream usage. Using fine-grained diagnostics for HC-based language models, we trace how multi-stream representations are actually used. We find that after an early seeding stage, residual mixing often remains close to identity, limiting a core HC mechanism for exchanging information between streams. Moreover, both signal and interpretable features concentrate in a dominant stream, and the nominally multi-stream residual connection can underutilize its capacity, behaving closer to a single-stream residual pathway. Finally, we show that breaking symmetry at stream initialization reduces dominant behavior and improves performance across \textit{m}HC variants. Our code is publicly available.

</details>


### [402] [HiSE: A Lightweight Hierarchical Semantic Explainer for Heterogeneous Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03495)
*Zongrui Li,Yuhang Zhao,Ying Zhao,Yuanzhao Guo,Qiang Huang,Yuan Tian*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出HiSE，一种轻量级、面向特征的异构图神经网络可解释方法。通过分层语义建模（语义层使用LASSO学习稀疏特征，跨语义层使用KL散度自适应融合），在不引入复杂搜索/扰动机制的前提下，实现了高保真、强鲁棒的跨语义解释，且计算开销低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有HGNN解释方法存在两个关键问题：1) 生成的解释无法反映HGNN固有的语义层次结构，缺乏对模型内部决策机制的高保真度；2) 特征解释依赖复杂的搜索或扰动机制，计算复杂度高、效率低下。因此需要一种既能保持语义层次感知又具有轻量级计算开销的解释方法。

Method: HiSE采用分层语义建模框架：1) 语义层——在每个语义视图下使用LASSO构建局部替代模型，学习稀疏特征表示；2) 跨语义层——通过KL散度自适应衡量不同语义视图的贡献，融合产生统一的解释。这种方法避免了复杂的搜索或扰动机制，实现了轻量化。

Result: 实验表明，HiSE在保真度（fidelity）、鲁棒性（robustness）和跨语义解释能力上均优于现有方法，同时因其轻量级框架，计算开销低，可高效应用于大规模复杂异构图。

Conclusion: HiSE有效解决了现有HGNN解释方法保真度不足与计算效率低下的矛盾，为高风险的异构图分析应用提供了一种兼顾语义层次与效率的可解释方案。

Abstract: Heterogeneous graph neural networks (HGNNs) have demonstrated remarkable performance in modeling complex relational data, however their interpretability in high-stakes applications remains a critical challenge. Existing explanation methods suffer from two major limitations: on the one hand, the generated explanations fail to reflect the inherent semantic hierarchy of HGNNs, resulting in a lack of fidelity to the model's internal decision-making mechanism; on the other hand, feature explanations often rely on complex search or perturbation mechanisms, leading to excessive computational complexity and poor efficiency. To address these issues, we propose HiSE, a lightweight feature-oriented interpretable model for HGNNs. HiSE achieves semantically aware feature explanations through hierarchical semantic modeling: at the semantic level, local surrogate models based on the Least Absolute Shrinkage and Selection Operator (LASSO) are employed to learn sparse feature representations under each semantic view; at the cross-semantic level, the contributions of different semantic views are adaptively characterized via KL divergence to produce a unified explanation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that HiSE outperforms existing methods in terms of fidelity, robustness, and cross-semantic explanation capability, while its lightweight framework incurs low computational overhead, enabling efficient application to large-scale, complex real-world heterogeneous graphs.

</details>


### [403] [Demystifying Pipeline Parallelism: First Theory for PipeDream](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03498)
*Ivan Ilin,Peter Richtárik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从理论和实验角度全面分析了PipeDream (PD)管道模型并行方法：提出了Randomized PipeDream (RPD)并给出了首个非凸收敛保证，推导了稳态PD的延迟与阶段数S的二次关系（延迟为S² - S/2 + O(1)，陈旧度贡献为Θ(γ²S⁴)），并与LocalSGD进行了实验比较，发现PD在二次目标和语言建模任务上表现更好，而LocalSGD在逻辑回归任务上随阶段数增加更具优势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着现代机器学习模型规模不断增长，模型参数、激活值和优化器状态无法再容纳于单个设备上，模型并行变得不可避免。然而，现有管道模型并行方法（如PipeDream）缺乏严格的理论收敛保证，同时其缩放特性尚不明确，因此需要从理论上分析其收敛性并诊断其扩展性能。

Method: 本文从三个方面展开研究：(1) 提出Randomized PipeDream (RPD)，一个陈旧块SGD抽象，用于建立PD风格方法的非凸收敛保证；(2) 推导稳态PD的延迟公式，分析陈旧度对收敛的影响；(3) 与LocalSGD进行实验对比，在二次目标、语言建模训练损失和逻辑回归任务上评估性能。

Result: 理论上给出了RPD的首个非凸收敛保证；证明了稳态PD延迟为S² - S/2 + O(1)，陈旧贡献为Θ(γ²S⁴)（等价于Θ(S⁴/K)）；实验表明PD在二次目标和语言建模任务上优于LocalSGD，而逻辑回归中LocalSGD随阶段数增加表现更好。

Conclusion: 管道模型并行方法PipeDream具有可量化的延迟和收敛特性，其性能相对于LocalSGD取决于具体目标任务和阶段数，为实际分布式训练中模型并行策略的选择提供了理论指导和实验依据。

Abstract: Training modern machine learning models increasingly requires computation to be distributed across many accelerators. Data parallelism remains the default choice and is often paired with tensor-parallel sharding, but model parallelism becomes unavoidable once parameters, activations, or optimizer states no longer fit on a single device. This paper studies pipeline model parallelism through the lens of PipeDream (PD) (Harlap et al., 2018). Our first contribution is theoretical: we introduce Randomized PipeDream (RPD), a stale block-SGD abstraction that yields, to our knowledge, the first clean nonconvex convergence guarantee for a PD-style method. Our second contribution is a scaling diagnosis: we prove that the delay induced by steady-state PD grows as $S^2 - S/2 + O(1)$ for $S$ stages, so the stale-read contribution in the convergence theorem scales as $Θ(γ^2 S^4)$, equivalently as $Θ(S^4/K)$ in the tuned-rate form. Our third contribution is a comparison with LocalSGD, whose periodic model averaging trades weight staleness for synchronization bubbles. In our reported simulated-time experiments, the better-performing method depends on the objective: PD performs better on the quadratic objective and on a small language-modeling training-loss task, while for logistic regression LocalSGD becomes superior as the number of stages increases.

</details>


### [404] [Post-Hoc Robustness for Model-Based Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03521)
*Siemen Herremans,Ali Anwar,Siegfried Mercelis*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需额外训练的推理时鲁棒性增强方法，通过在对抗性模型预测控制下进行稳健策略改进，显著提升了深度强化学习智能体在扰动环境下的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 提升强化学习在真实世界中的适用性，解决环境扰动下智能体鲁棒性不足的问题，同时避免训练阶段额外的神经网络计算开销。

Method: 在推理阶段，利用已学习的过渡模型和预先训练的名义策略，通过对抗性轨迹下的模型预测控制（MPC）进行稳健策略改进。对抗性轨迹通过投影梯度下降在有界不确定集内近似生成，并考虑了离线轨迹的分布外（OOD）问题。

Result: 在扰动的Gymnasium MuJoCo环境中，该方法显著提升了智能体的鲁棒性，同时满足了推理阶段的计算效率要求。

Conclusion: 本文提出的后验鲁棒化方法能够在不重新训练神经网络的情况下有效提升深度RL智能体的鲁棒性，为实际部署提供了可行的轻量化方案。

Abstract: To improve the real-world applicability of reinforcement learning (RL), the field of adversarially robust RL studies how to train agents under adversarial environment perturbations. In this setting, a protagonist agent optimizes a policy under environmental perturbations from an adversary, resulting in a zero-sum Markov game. When adversarially robust RL is combined with model-based RL, the adversary can target a learned transition model instead of the training environment. Extending this idea, this work introduces post-hoc robustification of deep RL agents at inference time. By using the learned model in combination with a trained nominal policy, our approach performs a robust policy improvement step. The goal is to improve robustness without any additional training of neural networks. Specifically, we utilize model-predictive control under adversarial rollouts, which are approximated via projected gradient descent within a bounded uncertainty set. Furthermore, these offline rollouts are performed while considering and mitigating out-of-distribution issues. The proposed methodology is validated by demonstrating significant improvements in robustness when the algorithm is evaluated in perturbed Gymnasium MuJoCo environments, while considering the computational limitations of the post-hoc inference setting.

</details>


### [405] [When Should the Teacher Move? Temporal Coupling and Stability in Self On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03532)
*Haowei Guo,Baolong Bi,Ruicheng Zhang,Bingqian Sun,Wentao Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究自在线蒸馏中学生与教师模型的时间耦合问题，发现隔离期（教师冻结）是稳定学习的关键，而非教师年龄。提出诊断框架揭示“状态遗忘崩溃”现象，并设计CGTR方法，通过基于奖励改进和长度尾部安全的门控机制替代时钟触发，实现零崩溃和最佳任务表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 教师更新调度（时间耦合）作为稳定变量未被系统研究，现有方法在长时训练中可能崩溃且这种失败对短时评估不可见。

Method: 通过控制调度扫描建立隔离期的重要性；提出时序KL结构、刷新冲击、长度尾部风险诊断框架；设计CGTR（Consolidation-Gated Teacher Refresh），以联合奖励改进和长度尾部安全为门控条件，替代固定时钟触发教师刷新。

Result: CGTR在四个任务（化学、生物、物理、工具使用）上实现零崩溃和最佳最终分数，无需每个数据集单独调参，能自适应调节刷新频率。

Conclusion: 教师更新时间耦合的隔离期是稳定学习的关键；基于学生巩固证据而非时钟信号的刷新机制能避免长时训练崩溃；状态遗忘崩溃是短时评估不可见的独特失败模式。

Abstract: Self on-policy distillation trains a student policy against a teacher derived from its own parameter history, yet the teacher's update schedule -- which governs the \emph{temporal coupling} between teacher and student -- has not been systematically studied as a stability variable. Through a controlled schedule sweep on Qwen3-8B, we establish that \emph{isolation periods}, defined as complete teacher freezing between updates, are the key structural property enabling stable learning, not teacher age. To characterize these underlying training dynamics, we introduce a diagnostic framework of temporal KL structure, refresh shock, and length-tail risk. This framework further uncovers \emph{state-oblivious collapse}: optimal short-horizon fixed schedules catastrophically fail under long-horizon training because a clock-driven refresh can copy a transiently drifting student into the teacher in a single, irreversible step. This failure mode is invisible under short-horizon evaluation and mechanistically distinct from EMA's chronic contamination. To address this, we propose \emph{Consolidation-Gated Teacher Refresh} (CGTR), which preserves isolation periods while gating each refresh on joint evidence of reward improvement and length-tail safety, ensuring every teacher movement responds to genuine student consolidation rather than a clock signal. With a single shared parameter set and no per-dataset retuning, CGTR achieves \textbf{zero collapse} and the best final score on all four tasks (Chemistry, Biology, Physics, ToolUse), self-regulating its refresh frequency to each task's learning dynamics.

</details>


### [406] [How Many Trees in a Random Forest? A Revisited Approach with Plateau Search and Optuna Integration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03549)
*Vadim Porvatov,Andrey Dukhovny,Andrey Lange*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对随机森林超参数优化中树的数量难以确定的问题，本文提出了一种基于三元组的高原搜索算法，将树的数量从TPE搜索空间中移除，通过自适应跟踪近乎最小的充分集成规模，实现了自动化且可解释的调参过程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随机森林的HPO中，树的数量（n_estimators）具有特殊性：预测性能随树的数量单调提升，导致TPE和Hyperband等方法总会将搜索结果推向预设范围的右边界；而早停策略又容易因分数噪声而过早停止。现有方法无法很好地解决这一矛盾。

Method: 提出一种集成三元组高原搜索算法：(1) 将树的数量从TPE直接搜索空间中移除；(2) 通过监控三个连续森林规模的OOB分数的相对变化来自适应地跟踪近乎最小的充分集成规模；(3) 根据容忍度参数动态调整三元组位置，实现自动化、可解释的流程；(4) 提供了理论分析，包括相对OOB分数准则与当前/极限分数差距的关系，以及相应的渐近方差估计。

Result: 实验表明，该方法选择的树的数量与传统启发式方法差异显著：对大多数经典基准数据集，选出的树数量更少；而对高维生物信息学数据集（如Arcene和Dorothea），选出的树数量则更大。

Conclusion: 该方法提供了一种自动化、可解释、理论有据的随机森林树数量选择方案，有效避免了传统HPO方法的边界偏向问题和早停策略的噪声敏感问题。

Abstract: Hyperparameter optimization (HPO) for Random Forest faces a specific difficulty in tuning the number of trees: the predictive score typically improves monotonically with ensemble size, so standard methods such as Tree-structured Parzen Estimator (TPE) and Hyperband require a predefined search range and often drive the estimate toward its right boundary. Early-stopping strategies avoid fixing such a range, but can be sensitive to score noise and prone to premature stopping. To address this, we propose an integrated triplet-based plateau-search algorithm that removes the number of trees from the direct TPE search space and still exploits information accumulated across HPO trials. The method adaptively tracks a near-minimal sufficient ensemble size by monitoring relative changes in the out-of-bag (OOB) score across a triplet of forest sizes and shifting this triplet accordingly. This yields an automated and user-interpretable procedure based on a tolerance parameter. We also provide a theoretical analysis: we relate the proposed relative OOB-score criterion to the gap between the current and limiting scores, and derive an asymptotic variance estimate for the corresponding OOB-based absolute relative difference. Experiments show that the selected number of trees can differ substantially from the common heuristic: for most classical benchmark datasets it is smaller, whereas for some high-dimensional bioinformatics datasets, such as Arcene and Dorothea, it is larger. The source code and reproducible experiments are available at https://github.com/lange-am/rf_plateau_hpo.

</details>


### [407] [Analytical Evaluation of DCA Convergence Properties for Minimizing Prediction Functions of Gaussian RBF Support Vector Regression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03559)
*Yohei Kakimoto,Yuto Omae,Hirotaka Takahashi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对基于RBF核的SVR模型的非凸优化问题，提出了一种利用RBF核解析结构构造显式DC分解的DCA框架，推导了强凸参数下界μ和梯度Lipschitz常数上界L的闭合形式，发现二者共享主导项C_αρ，并通过数值实验验证该标量可提前评估DCA的收敛性质。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非凸优化问题中，RBF-SVR模型的预测函数作为目标函数时，缺乏有效的优化框架，且DCA的收敛性质难以预先评估。

Method: 利用RBF核的解析结构构造显式DC分解，推导μ和L的闭合形式（均由C_α、γ和ρ决定，共享主导项C_αρ），并通过六个基准函数的数值实验验证其收敛性质和初值依赖性。

Result: C_αρ是表征DCA收敛性质和初值依赖性的主要单一标量；该标量分解为C→C_α和γ→ρ两条独立路径，主要变化由SVR超参数(C,γ)控制。

Conclusion: 通过单一标量C_αρ可提前（训练前近似，训练后精确闭式）评估DCA在RBF-SVR上的收敛性质。

Abstract: For nonconvex optimization problems whose objective is the prediction function of a trained Support Vector Regression (SVR) model with the Gaussian radial basis function (RBF) kernel (RBF-SVR), we present a framework that applies the difference of convex functions (DC) algorithm (DCA) by exploiting the analytical structure of the RBF kernel to construct an explicit DC decomposition. Specifically, we derive in closed form both the lower bound $μ$ of the strong convexity parameter of the DC components and the upper bound $L$ of the gradient Lipschitz constant of the subproblem. Both $μ$ and $L$ are determined solely by the post-training dual-coefficient sum $C_α$ and the RBF kernel parameter $γ$, together with the DC decomposition parameter $ρ$, and they share a common leading term $C_αρ$. Through numerical experiments on six benchmark functions, we show that $C_αρ$ is the primary single quantity characterizing both the convergence properties and the initial-point dependence of DCA, and further demonstrate that it decomposes into two independent pathways, $C \to C_α$ and $γ\to ρ$, with its primary variation governed by the SVR hyperparameters $(C, γ)$. Together, these results allow the convergence properties of DCA on RBF-SVR to be assessed in advance through the single scalar quantity $C_αρ$: approximately from $(C, γ)$ before training, and exactly in closed form after training.

</details>


### [408] [CauTion: Knowing When to Trust LLMs for Ensemble Causal Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03602)
*Bo Peng,Kaiwen Wu,Sirui Chen,Zhiheng Wang,Yu Qiao,Chaochao Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出CauTion框架，通过共识滤波和LLM可靠性估计，将LLM领域知识可靠地集成到多个统计因果发现算法的集成中，在六数据集上持续超越基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纯统计方法在因果发现中存在等价类不可区分、有限样本敏感等局限；现有LLM增强方法易受LLM错误影响、token成本高，且依赖单一算法会导致结果对算法特定偏差敏感。

Method: 三阶段框架：1) 算法集成通过共识投票解决算法一致边（准确率近完美）；2) 信任校准仲裁机制通过无标注的信任校准估计LLM与算法的相对可靠性，仅在算法证据不可靠时引入LLM仲裁；3) 环路修复确保最终图的无环性。

Result: 在六个数据集上持续优于纯数据驱动和LLM增强基线，在大图上增益更显著，对LLM错误具有强鲁棒性。
