TL;DR: 本文提出了一种受人类睡眠启发的“Sleep”范式，包含记忆巩固（Knowledge Seeding蒸馏）和做梦（Dreaming自我改进）两个阶段，使深度学习模型能够持续学习并将短期记忆转化为长期知识，实验证明该方法在长程任务、持续学习、知识融入和少样本泛化方面有效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大语言模型虽然在即时预测和上下文学习方面表现良好，但缺乏持续学习能力，无法将时间性上下文知识有效转移到长期参数中。

Method: 提出“Sleep”范式，包含两个阶段：(1) 记忆巩固（Knowledge Seeding）：通过结合同策略蒸馏和基于强化学习的模仿学习的广义蒸馏过程，将小网络的知识蒸馏到更大网络中；(2) 做梦（Dreaming）：模型使用强化学习生成合成数据课程，自主排练新知识并改进现有能力。

Result: 在长程任务、持续学习、知识融入和少样本泛化任务上的实验支持了睡眠阶段的重要性。

Conclusion: 受人类学习过程启发的Sleep范式能有效解决模型持续学习问题，通过蒸馏和自主梦境排练实现短期记忆向长期知识的转化。

Abstract: The past few decades have witnessed significant advances in the design of machine learning algorithms, from early studies on task-specific shallow models to more general deep Large Language Models (LLMs). Despite showing promising results in tasks that require instant prediction or in-context learning, existing models lack the ability to continually learn and effectively transfer their temporal in-context knowledge to their long-term parameters. Inspired by human learning process, we introduce a ''Sleep'' paradigm that allows the models to continually learn, distill their short-term fragile memories into stable long-term knowledge with replay, and recursively improve themselves with ''Dreaming'' process. In more detail, sleep consists of two stages: (1) Memory Consolidation: an upward distillation process, called Knowledge Seeding, where the memories of a smaller-self are distilled into a larger network to provide more capacity while preserving the knowledge. As a proof of concept, we present a new Generalized Distillation process for {Knowledge Seeding} (i.e., the combination of on-policy distillation with Reinforcement Learning (RL)-based imitation learning); (2) Dreaming: a self-improvement phase, where the model uses RL to generate a curriculum of synthetic data to rehearse new knowledge and refine existing capabilities without human supervision. Our experiments on long-horizon, continual learning, knowledge incorporation, and few-shot generalization tasks support the importance of the sleep stage.

</details>


<div id='cs.MM'></div>

# cs.MM [[Back]](#toc)

### [446] [Inference-Time Scaling for Joint Audio-Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03183)
*Jaemin Jung,Kyeongha Rho,Inkyu Shin,Joon Son Chung*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究了推理时缩放（ITS）在联合音视频生成中的应用，提出了多验证器框架和自适应奖励加权（ARW）算法，有效提升了语义对齐、感知质量和音视频同步性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联合音视频生成模型需要大量训练资源，而ITS在单模态领域有效但难以直接扩展到多模态，因为需要平衡多个异构目标。

Method: 提出多验证器框架解决单目标指导的局限性；通过系统分析找出最优多验证器组合；提出自适应奖励加权（ARW）算法，将奖励聚合视为在线优化问题，用可学习参数校准奖励方差，无需先验知识即可实现鲁棒的多目标选择。

Result: 在VGGSound和JavisBench-mini基准上，该框架显著提升了语义对齐、感知质量和音视频同步性。

Conclusion: 多验证器框架和ARW算法有效解决了ITS在多模态生成中的扩展问题，实现了无需额外训练资源的性能提升。

Abstract: Joint audio-video generation aims to synthesize realistic audio-video pairs that are both semantically aligned with text prompts and precisely synchronized. While existing joint audio-video generation models often require substantial training resources to improve fidelity, Inference-Time Scaling (ITS) has recently emerged as a promising training-free alternative in single-modality domains. However, extending ITS from a single modality to multimodal domains is non-trivial, as it requires balancing multiple heterogeneous objectives. In this paper, we present the first comprehensive study of ITS for joint audio-video generation. We first demonstrate that a multi-verifier framework is essential to address the limitations of single-objective guidance, including asymmetric performance trade-offs and verifier hacking. Through systematic analysis, we then identify an optimal multi-verifier combination that yields balanced improvements across all quality dimensions. Finally, to effectively aggregate diverse reward signals, we propose Adaptive Reward Weighting (ARW), a novel test-time optimization algorithm. ARW treats reward aggregation as an online optimization problem, utilizing learnable parameters to calibrate reward variances without requiring prior knowledge of reward distributions, thereby ensuring robust multi-objective selection. Experimental results on VGGSound and JavisBench-mini benchmarks demonstrate that our framework significantly enhances semantic alignment, perceptual quality, and audio-visual synchronization of generated outputs. Synthesized samples and code are available on the project page: https://jung-jaemin.github.io/ITS-AVGen-Proj.

</details>


### [447] [OmniHalluc-L: Counterfactual Benchmarking and Modality-Perturbation Reliability Calibration for Long-Form Omni Hallucination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03614)
*Zixuan Dong,Jiafu Tang,Zhide Lei,Zhe Cao,Zijie Zhang,Yanghai Wang,Shihao Li,Xiaodong Wang,Baoyun Peng,Jiaheng Liu*

Main category: cs.MM

TL;DR: 本文发现长视频全能助手常犯“几乎正确”的错误：证据真实但绑定错误（如听对话正确、看事件正确，却把台词安错人）。为此提出反事实事件绑定协议，构建长视频全能幻觉基准Bench，发现开源模型在配对层级绑定上表现差（Qwen2.5-Omni-7B仅32.06%）。作者提出模态扰动可靠性校准方法，在不更新主干的情况下提升模型性能（Qwen3从41.55%提升至51.09%），并在其他基准上也有提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有长视频问答评测无法检测“几乎正确”的错误——模型虽然使用了真实证据，但错误地将证据绑定到错误的说话人、时刻或模态。这种错误在逐项评分中会被误判为正确，需要提出新的评测协议。

Method: 提出反事实事件绑定协议，为每个音频-视觉事件证据构建配对的支持性/反事实性断言，通过严格配对准确率评估。提出模态扰动可靠性校准方法，在视频级折内选择音频负样本，将其响应偏移与原生音视频置信度融合，生成每项断言的支持度估计。

Result: Qwen2.5-Omni-7B配对绑定准确率32.06%，Qwen3-Omni-Instruct 41.55%，闭源参考达76.54%。本文方法将Qwen2.5-Omni-7B提升至36.22%，Qwen3提升至51.09%，并在OmniVideoBench（+2.20）和WorldSense（+1.51）上提升目标自适应多项选择准确率。

Conclusion: 长视频全能模型的跨模态事件绑定能力仍严重不足，反事实评测协议能有效暴露此类缺陷；提出的模态扰动校准方法可在不更新主干的情况下显著改善绑定可靠性。

Abstract: Long-video Omni assistants often fail not by inventing content, but by misbinding real evidence: they hear the right utterance and see the right event, yet attach it to the wrong speaker, moment, or modality. These \emph{almost-true} errors evade standard video QA because local evidence remains valid, so item-level scoring can reward both a supported claim and its near-counterfactual. We introduce a counterfactual event-binding protocol that constructs paired supported/counterfactual claims from the same audio-visual event evidence and evaluates them by strict-pair accuracy. We instantiate it as \bench, a benchmark for long-video Omni hallucination, with 3{,}600 single-claim QA items from 638 long-form videos averaging 24.16 minutes and covering 256.87 hours. Under this protocol, open-weight Omni models remain weak at pair-level binding: Qwen2.5-Omni-7B reaches 32.06\% and Qwen3-Omni-Instruct reaches 41.55\%, versus 76.54\% for a closed-source reference. To narrow this gap without updating the backbone, we propose \method, Modality-Perturbation Reliability Calibration, a frozen-backbone framework that selects audio-negative probes within video-level folds and fuses their response shifts with native audio-visual confidence into per-claim support estimates. \method lifts Qwen2.5-Omni-7B to 36.22\% and Qwen3 to 51.09\% on \bench, and improves target-adapted MCQ accuracy on OmniVideoBench ($+$2.20) and WorldSense ($+$1.51) with Qwen3.

</details>


<div id='cs.IR'></div>

# cs.IR [[Back]](#toc)

### [448] [Cost-Aware Query Routing in RAG: Empirical Analysis of Retrieval Depth Tradeoffs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02581)
*Sanjay Mishra*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: CA-RAG提出了一个成本感知的检索增强生成路由框架，通过为每个查询动态选择最优的"策略包"（耦合检索深度和生成配置），在保证答案质量的同时，相比始终重检索节省26%的计费token，相比始终直接推理降低34%的延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG面临三重矛盾：更深检索提升事实准确性但增加token成本和延迟；静态检索配置无法适应异构查询负载——简单定义性查询浪费预算，复杂分析性提示检索不足。

Method: CA-RAG是一个每查询路由框架，从离散的策略包目录中选择最优组合。每个策略包耦合检索深度（从无检索直接推理到top-k=10稠密检索）和固定生成配置。通过最大化标量效用函数（线性组合估计质量先验与延迟和计费token的归一化惩罚）进行选择，基于FAISS稠密检索和OpenAI API实现。

Result: 在28个查询基准上，CA-RAG动态利用所有策略包：比始终重检索节省26%计费token，比始终直接推理降低34%平均延迟，同时保持等价答案质量。每查询delta分析显示节省集中在简单查询，敏感性分析表明可通过权重调整支持多个成本-延迟-质量操作点。

Conclusion: CA-RAG为成本敏感的LLM部署提供了透明、可审计的基础框架，结果完全从CSV日志文件生成以确保可复现性。

Abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) faces a fundamental three-way tension: deeper retrieval improves factual grounding but inflates token costs and end-to-end latency. Static retrieval configurations cannot resolve this tension across heterogeneous query workloads -- simple definitional queries waste budget on unnecessary context, while complex analytical prompts are underserved by shallow retrieval. This paper introduces \emph{Cost-Aware RAG} (CA-RAG), a per-query routing framework that selects from a discrete catalog of \emph{strategy bundles} -- each coupling a retrieval depth (from retrieval-free direct inference to top-$k{=}10$ dense retrieval) with a fixed generation profile -- by maximizing a scalar utility that linearly combines an estimated quality prior with normalized penalties for predicted latency and total billed tokens. CA-RAG is implemented with FAISS-backed dense retrieval and OpenAI chat/embedding APIs, and evaluated on a 28-query benchmark spanning four bundles. The router dynamically exercises all bundles, achieving \textbf{26\% fewer billed tokens} than always-heavy retrieval and \textbf{34\% lower mean latency} than always-direct inference while maintaining equivalent answer quality. Per-query delta analysis reveals that savings are non-uniform and concentrated in simpler queries, motivating complexity-aware guardrails. Sensitivity analysis confirms that the same bundle catalog supports multiple cost-latency-quality operating points through weight adjustment alone. All results are generated directly from logged CSV artifacts for full reproducibility. CA-RAG provides a transparent, auditable foundation for cost-conscious LLM deployments.

</details>


### [449] [Attention Calibration for Position-Fair Dense Information Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02737)
*Andrianos Michail,Elias Schuhmacher,Juri Opitz,Simon Clematide,Rico Sennrich*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种无需重新训练即可在推理阶段减少密集检索模型中位置偏差的方法，通过注意力校准与强度系数lambda的插值，实现了位置公平性与检索效果之间的权衡，并在多语言多领域数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 密集检索模型存在位置偏差：当相关信息出现在段落较后位置时，检索效果会下降。现有方法需要重新训练或牺牲整体检索效果，本文旨在推理阶段减少这种偏差，无需重新训练且不牺牲检索效果。

Method: 将推理时注意力校准方法适配到下游检索任务，并引入强度系数lambda在原始注意力分布与完全校准的注意力分布之间进行插值。通过调整篮子大小(B)、校准层集和强度参数，探索部分校准与完全校准的效果差异。

Result: 在SQuAD-PosQ和FineWeb-PosQ上测试三种嵌入模型，发现部分校准通常优于完全校准。单一配置(B=128, lambda=0.5, 50%层深度)在FineWeb-PosQ上提升了三个模型的位置组nDCG@10调和均值，且适用于<s>-pooled和last-token-pooled架构。该配置在PosIR（10种语言、31个领域）上无修改迁移，在所有16种长度四分位×模型×检索设置组合中降低了位置敏感指数，同时保持或提升了聚合nDCG@10。

Conclusion: 提出的推理时注意力校准方法能有效减少密集检索模型的位置偏差，部分校准优于完全校准，且单一默认配置具有良好的跨模型、跨语言、跨领域迁移性，无需每模型单独调参。

Abstract: Dense retrieval models exhibit positional bias: retrieval effectiveness degrades when relevant information appears later in a passage (Zeng et al., 2025). We ask whether this bias can be reduced at inference time, without retraining and without sacrificing overall retrieval effectiveness. To this end, we adapt inference-time attention calibration (Schuhmacher et al., 2026) to downstream retrieval and extend it with a strength coefficient lambda that interpolates between the original and fully calibrated attention distributions. Across three embedding models on SQuAD-PosQ and FineWeb-PosQ, we examine how basket size, calibrated layer set, and strength affect the trade-off between positional fairness and retrieval effectiveness, finding that partial calibration frequently outperforms full calibration. A single configuration (B=128, lambda=0.5, 50% layer depth) improves the harmonic mean of nDCG@10 across positional groups on FineWeb-PosQ for all three models without per-model tuning, and applies to both <s>-pooled and last-token-pooled architectures. This default configuration transfers without modification to PosIR, which spans 10 languages and 31 domains, reducing the Position Sensitivity Index in all 16 length-quartile x model x retrieval-setting combinations, while preserving or improving aggregate nDCG@10. We release our extended codebase at https://github.com/impresso/fair-sentence-transformers

</details>


### [450] [Do Neural Retrievers Prefer Certain Documents? Evidence of Learned Relevance Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02814)
*Francisco Valentini,Edgar Altszyler,Martin Fajcik*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 该论文发现监督式神经检索器会隐式学习文档级别的相关性先验——一种与查询无关的、从训练数据中习得的文档偏好信号。这种先验导致"可发现性差距"：先验较低的文档即使真正相关也更难被检索到。这种偏差源于标注数据本身倾向于选择全面、自包含的主流内容，而忽略碎片化、技术性强的文档。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究监督式双编码器检索器是否在训练过程中隐式学习了文档级别的相关性先验（即与查询无关的信号），以及这种先验如何影响检索公平性和效果。

Method: 在冻结的文档嵌入上训练简单的分类器来估计相关性先验；在多个IR基准上评估三种最先进的检索器；利用LLM分析文档特征，解释先验的来源。

Result: 监督神经检索器编码了可泛化到未见文档的相关性先验，且跨模型一致；这种先验导致"可发现性差距"——低先验文档更难被检索；该效应在监督式稠密检索器中显著，在BM25中较弱；被判定为相关的文档往往是全面、自包含的主流内容，而碎片化或高度技术性的内容常被遗漏。

Conclusion: 监督式检索存在结构性局限：模型不仅学习相关性，还内化了训练数据中隐含的文档偏好，导致对非主流内容的系统性歧视。

Abstract: Neural retrievers are trained to estimate query-document relevance from annotated query-document pairs. Yet annotation protocols may not purely reflect relevance: they select only a subset of documents for labeling, and this selection can favor certain document types over others. We investigate whether supervised bi-encoder retrievers implicitly learn a document-level relevance prior: a query-independent signal encoded in their representation space as a side effect of training on annotated data. We estimate this prior by training simple classifiers on frozen document embeddings and evaluate three state-of-the-art retrievers across multiple IR benchmarks. We find that supervised neural retrievers encode relevance priors that generalize to unseen documents and are consistent across models. These priors create a findability gap: documents with lower prior are systematically harder to retrieve, even when genuinely relevant. This effect appears in supervised dense retrievers but is weaker and less consistent in BM25, and it persists under controlled matched-document comparisons. Using LLM-based explanations, we find that judged-relevant documents tend to be comprehensive, self-contained summaries of mainstream topics, while niche, fragmentary, or highly technical content is often left unjudged. Retrievers internalize this bias, ranking documents with these favored features higher than documents that lack them, independently of their actual relevance. Our findings expose a structural limitation of supervised retrieval: models trained on annotated data do not just learn relevance, but also the implicit document preferences in their training data.

</details>


### [451] [BAHSD: Bridging the Long-tail Gap via Adaptive Distillation in Black-box Sequential Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03091)
*Xi Zhou,Famin Wu,Mingming Li,Hongyue Zhang,Jiao Dai,Jizhong Han,Tao Guo*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出BAHSD，一种黑盒自适应蒸馏框架，通过多尺度一致性探测处理长尾分布下的信号异质性，利用动态温度KL散度、排序一致性和InfoNCE对比学习实现差异化知识迁移，在序列推荐模型提取中取得显著提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有序列推荐模型提取方法采用"一刀切"策略，忽略了长尾分布导致的信号异质性：头部序列偏好固化导致局部偏差，尾部序列预测扁平且噪声多，导致噪声过拟合和次优知识迁移。

Method: 提出BAHSD框架：(1) 多尺度一致性探测机制隐式量化信号可靠性；(2) 自适应分层目标：高置信信号用动态温度KL散度缓解偏好固化，低置信信号用排序一致性和InfoNCE对比学习提供噪声鲁棒增强。

Result: BAHSD持续优于基线，相比教师模型提升最高4.98%，在尾部用户上提升80%+。

Conclusion: BAHSD作为即插即用方案，有效解决了黑盒推荐模型提取中的信号异质性问题，实现了高保真度的知识迁移。

Abstract: Sequential recommendation systems are widely adopted but often deployed as black-box APIs, which has driven recent interest in model extraction to replicate their capabilities locally. However, the long-tail distribution induces severe signal heterogeneity: dense head sequences trigger the solidification of teacher preference, biasing extraction toward local patterns, while sparse tail sequences yield flat, noisy predictions. Existing one-size-fits-all extraction overlooks this disparity, resulting in noise overfitting and suboptimal knowledge transfer. We propose BAHSD, a black-box adaptive distillation framework that handles signal heterogeneity via a multi-scale consistency probing mechanism to implicitly quantify signal reliability. Based on this, an adaptive hierarchical objective is designed: dynamic-temperature KL divergence mitigates preference solidification for high-confidence signals, while ranking consistency and InfoNCE contrastive learning provide noise-robust enhancement for low-confidence signals. BAHSD consistently outperforms baselines, achieving up to 4.98\% gain over the teacher and 80\%+ improvement on tail users, offering a plug-and-play solution for high-fidelity black-box recommendation extraction.

</details>


### [452] [Section-Weighted Hybrid Approach for Legal Case Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03138)
*Rajith Arulanandam,Nisansa de Silva*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种两阶段、分章节的法律案例检索框架，先利用LLM将判决书分割为事实、争议、判决和推理等部分，然后通过粗粒度检索（BM25+密集向量+RRF融合）构建高召回候选池，再进行细粒度“同类对比”（如查询推理 vs. 候选推理），并使用查询级Z-score归一化和学习到的章节权重聚合信号，最终返回相关章节文本、简洁理由和立场标签。在司法管辖区级基准上，该方法持续优于强词法和神经基线，且保持高候选覆盖率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有法律案例检索方法主要依赖表面词汇重叠，难以捕捉更深层次的法律推理对应关系，导致难以找到真正具有类比意义的先例。

Method: 两阶段框架：(1) 用LLM离线分割判决书为事实、争议、判决和推理章节；(2) 阶段一：并行使用BM25（词法）和密集ANN（语义）进行全文搜索，通过RRF融合形成高召回候选池；(3) 阶段二：进行细粒度的“同类对比”（如查询的推理部分与候选的推理部分对比），对词法分数和余弦相似度进行查询级Z-score归一化，再用学习到的章节权重聚合信号；(4) 输出时返回相关章节文本、简洁推理理由和当事人立场标签。

Result: 在司法管辖区级基准上，该方法持续优于强词法基线和神经基线，同时保持高候选覆盖率。

Conclusion: 通过分章节对比和归一化信号聚合，可以有效捕捉法律推理层面的类比关系，提升法律案例检索的准确性和可解释性。

Abstract: Finding truly analogous precedents requires capturing legal reasoning beyond surface word overlap. We present a two-stage, section-aware framework for legal case retrieval that first segments raw judgments into facts, issues, decision, and reasoning using a deterministic large language model (LLM) offline. In Stage 1, we combine parallel lexical (BM25) and semantic (dense ANN) whole-document searches via Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) to form a high-recall candidate pool. In Stage 2, we perform fine-grained, like-for-like comparisons (e.g., query reasoning vs. candidate reasoning). To address the scale mismatch between unbounded lexical scores and cosine similarities, we apply query-wise Z-score normalization before aggregating signals with learned section weights. For the top results, the system returns the relevant section text with a concise, grounded rationale and party-stance labels. We evaluate on a jurisdiction-scale benchmark, demonstrating consistent gains over strong lexical and neural baselines while maintaining high candidate coverage

</details>


### [453] [VirtualMLE: A Virtual ML Engineer that Optimizes Sequential Recommenders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03221)
*Shiteng Cao,Jingwen Liu,Junda She,Zhiheng Li*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出VirtualMLE框架，利用LLM智能体通过执行-反思-记忆更新的闭环自动化序列推荐模型的调优过程，显著减少试验次数并支持启发式知识的跨数据集迁移。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前序列推荐模型在新数据集上的调优仍严重依赖人工试错，效率低下，缺乏自动化方法。

Method: 构建LLM智能体框架VirtualMLE，包含执行、反思和记忆更新三个环节；采用分层记忆系统存储启发式反馈，支持认知总结的跨数据集迁移。

Result: 在三个Amazon SR基准上使用SASRec和HSTU两种骨干网络，以更少试验次数达到有竞争力的推荐质量；从先前数据集提炼的认知总结能显著加速新数据集的搜索过程。

Conclusion: 配备反思与记忆能力的LLM智能体可以作为虚拟工程师，有效自动化序列推荐优化中的启发式学习过程。

Abstract: Recent advancements in Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in reasoning, reflection, and tool utilization, unlocking new paradigms for automating complex engineering workflows. However, in the domain of sequential recommendation (SR), tuning models on new datasets still relies heavily on the manual trial-and-error of experienced machine learning engineers. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{VirtualMLE}, an LLM-agent framework that leverages the cognitive capabilities of LLMs to organize recommender optimizing into a closed loop of execution, reflection, and memory update. After each trial, the agent explicitly analyzes the observed outcomes and stores concise heuristic feedback in a hierarchical memory system. We evaluate VirtualMLE on three Amazon SR benchmarks with two representative backbones, SASRec and HSTU. VirtualMLE reaches competitive recommendation quality with substantially fewer trials. Furthermore, we observe that cognition summaries distilled from previous datasets can significantly accelerate the search process on unseen datasets, demonstrating the potential of transferring tuning heuristics. Overall, our results provide compelling evidence that LLM agents equipped with reflection and memory can serve as practical virtual engineers to automate and amortize heuristic learning in SR optimization. Our codes are available.

</details>


### [454] [Generalizing Graph Foundation Models via Hyperbolic Retrieval-Augmented Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03307)
*Yifan Jin,Qirui Ji,Bin Qin,Jiangmeng Li,Lixiang Liu,Fuchun Sun,Changwen Zheng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出HyRAG框架，通过双曲空间建模树状知识库，利用多粒度检索和双路径融合增强图基础模型的零样本泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图基础模型(GFMs)在分布偏移下泛化能力不足，而传统的检索增强生成(RAG)在欧氏空间中处理树状知识库时存在几何不匹配问题，导致语义粒度丢失和枢纽现象(hubness)。

Method: 提出双曲检索增强生成(HyRAG)框架，包含三个模块：(1) 双曲知识索引模块，在双曲空间中建模外部知识库的树状层级；(2) 多粒度检索模块，通过粗粒度和细粒度检索分别提供全局语义锚点和局部语义细节；(3) 双路径融合模块，在特征和结构两个层面实现知识整合。

Result: 在多个图基准测试中，HyRAG在零样本设定下取得了显著改进，验证了方法对鲁棒GFMs推理的泛化能力。

Conclusion: HyRAG通过双曲几何有效解决了欧氏空间中树状知识库的几何不匹配问题，为GFMs的检索增强提供了一种新的高效范式。

Abstract: Graph foundation models (GFMs) emerged as a dominant paradigm in graph representation learning by leveraging large-scale pre-training for cross-domain inference. However, the parameterized knowledge encoded within these models is insufficient to cope with distribution shifts, limiting their generalization ability. To mitigate this issue, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) has been introduced to incorporate external knowledge at inference time. Nevertheless, existing RAG frameworks operating in Euclidean space suffer from a fundamental geometric limitation: the polynomial volume growth of Euclidean space is inherently mismatched with the tree-structured external knowledge bases. This mismatch leads to the loss of semantic granularity in retrieval and gives rise to the hubness phenomenon.To address this limitation, we propose a Hyperbolic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (HyRAG) framework designed to enhance the generalization capabilities of GFMs. Specifically, the introduced Hyperbolic Knowledge Indexing module retains the tree-like hierarchies of the external knowledge base by modeling them within hyperbolic space. The Multi-granularity Retrieval module then provides GFMs with the global semantic anchors and local semantic nuances through coarse-grained and fine-grained knowledge retrieval, respectively. Finally, the Dual-path Fusion module achieves effective knowledge integration for graph tasks at both the feature and structural levels.Experiments on multiple graph benchmarks demonstrate significant improvements in the zero-shot setting, highlighting the generalization of our method for robust GFMs inference.

</details>


### [455] [Can LLM Rerankers Predict Their Own Ranking Performance?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03535)
*Shiyu Ni,Keping Bi,Jiafeng Guo,Jingtong Wu,Zengxin Han,Xueqi Cheng*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文研究了LLM重排序器能否在生成排序结果后自行评估排序质量（即重排序器内部查询性能预测）。实验发现，基于自一致性的无训练方法在大部分场景下与现有最优方法相当且校准更好，而直接的口头置信度则严重过度自信。为此，提出了两种监督方法（Verb-Num和Verb-List），仅需少量额外输出token即可生成校准良好的排序质量估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有查询性能预测（QPP）方法大多在检索或重排序后依赖外部预测器，尚未探索能否让LLM重排序器在生成排序结果的同时自行评估该结果的质量。

Method: 提出了两类方法：1）无训练方法：基于采样排序的度量特异性自一致性（self-consistency）和重排序器直接输出的口头化置信度（verbalized confidence）；2）监督方法：Verb-Num和Verb-List，通过少量额外输出token使LLM重排序器生成校准的排序质量估计。

Result: 在TREC Deep Learning 2019-2022数据集上使用四种LLM进行实验，结果表明自一致性与现有最优方法竞争力相当，且在几乎所有设置下校准更好；直接口头置信度则严重过度自信。提出的Verb-Num和Verb-List监督方法能有效改善校准效果。

Conclusion: LLM重排序器内部可以进行有效的查询性能预测，自一致性方法表现优异，而口头置信度需要额外的监督校准方法（Verb-Num和Verb-List）来提升性能。

Abstract: Retrieval effectiveness varies substantially across queries, making it important to estimate ranking quality before relevance judgments are available. Query performance prediction (QPP) addresses this need, but most existing methods rely on external predictors after retrieval or reranking. In this paper, we study \textit{reranker-internal QPP}: can an LLM reranker estimate the quality of the ranking it has just produced? We investigate both training-free and training-based approaches. For training-free estimation, we examine metric-specific self-consistency across sampled rankings and verbalized confidence produced directly by the reranker. Experiments on TREC Deep Learning 2019--2022 with four LLMs show that self-consistency is competitive with the state-of-the-art (SOTA) approach and better calibrated in almost all settings, while direct verbalized confidence is severely overconfident. To improve verbalized confidence, we propose two supervised methods, Verb-Num and Verb-List, which enable LLM rerankers to produce calibrated ranking-quality estimates with only a few additional output tokens.

</details>


### [456] [Skill Is Not Document: A Query-Conditional Benchmark and Two-Stage Retriever for LLM Agent Skill Routing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03565)
*Zifei Wang,Wei Wen,Qiang Ji,Ruizhi Qiao,Xing Sun*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出R3（Reject-as-Resource Retriever）框架，利用LLM自身的拒绝信号（即"哪些技能不应被联合检索"）作为训练信号，构建了双语技能检索基准R3-Skill，并设计了两阶段检索系统（R3-Embedding + R3-Reranker），在技能兼容性建模上取得显著效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有技能检索仅关注单个查询-技能对的语义相关性，忽略了技能之间能否协作完成任务的"技能兼容性"问题。而LLM在数据合成时产生的拒绝决策信号被当作低质量数据丢弃，未能有效利用。

Method: 1) 构建R3-Skill双语基准（中英），经多专家交叉验证；2) 设计两阶段检索系统：R3-Embedding（双编码器）+ R3-Reranker（交叉编码器），将技能兼容性作为显式训练信号；3) 梯度分析发现"推开"信号在双编码器中被双边平衡稀释，但在交叉编码器中可作为无损分级排序监督，因此将兼容性信号放在重排序阶段。

Result: 在R3-Skill上，R3-Embedding + R3-Reranker管线达到Hit@1=0.7714, NDCG@10=0.8327, Set-Compat=0.3525。

Conclusion: 利用LLM的拒绝信号作为技能兼容性监督是有效的；交叉编码器比双编码器更适合建模技能兼容性信号；数据集、代码和模型均已开源。

Abstract: LLM agents complete complex tasks by composing multiple skills, and skill retrieval is a front-end stage for agents. Skill retrieval differs fundamentally from traditional document retrieval at the supervision level: top-K joint correctness depends not only on the semantic relevance of each individual query-skill pair, but also on whether the skills retrieved together can collaborate to fulfill the task under the given query. Such "skill compatibility" cannot be derived from independent relevance alone. Yet existing LLM-based data synthesis pipelines can produce a direct supervision signal for "which skills should not be jointly retrieved under this query" -- namely the LLM's own rejection decisions -- and this signal is routinely discarded as low-quality data. To address this gap, we propose Reject-as-Resource Retriever (R3) and construct R3-Skill, a bilingual (Chinese-English) skill retrieval benchmark targeting realistic agent skill routing. R3-Skill spans four language directions, features query phrasings close to real user requests, and is verified through multi-expert cross-checking. On R3-Skill, we build a two-stage retrieval system (R3-Embedding + R3-Reranker) with skill compatibility as an explicit training signal. Gradient analysis shows that the "push-away" signal is diluted by bilateral balancing in the bi-encoder but acts as lossless graded ranking supervision in the cross-encoder -- motivating its placement at the cross-encoder stage, as confirmed by ablations on two datasets. The R3-Embedding + R3-Reranker pipeline attains Hit@1 = 0.7714, NDCG@10 = 0.8327 and Set-Compat = 0.3525 on R3-Skill. The dataset, training code and model weights are released as open source for agent skill routing.

</details>


### [457] [MARS: Multi-rate Aggregation of Recency Signals for Sequential Recommendation across Sparse and Dense Regimes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03718)
*Zhenyu Yu,Shuigeng Zhou*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 提出MARS，一种编码器无关的聚合算子，通过多尺度时间聚合提升序列推荐性能，在稀疏和密集数据上均达到SOTA，且计算开销极低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有序列推荐方法（Transformer/SSM）无法显式建模用户行为的多尺度时间结构，本文旨在引入一种能捕获不同时间尺度的聚合机制。

Method: MARS：编码器无关的聚合算子，消费真实时间戳，生成K个强调不同时间尺度的摘要，通过上下文自适应门控融合。支持两种实例化：MARS-T（Transformer，用于稀疏数据）和MARS-M（Mamba，用于密集数据），基于平均序列长度自动选择。

Result: 在5个公开基准上，MARS在HR@10上均取得最佳结果：稀疏数据上平均相对提升+19.7%（Games上+36.2%），密集数据上HR@10 +3.2% / NDCG +0.9%且计算量减少42%。消融实验显示边际贡献+4%~+19% HR@10。

Conclusion: MARS以极少的参数开销（最多+6%）和线性时间复杂度，在准确率-效率帕累托前沿上占据优势，验证了显式多尺度时间建模在序列推荐中的有效性。

Abstract: Sequential recommenders weight historical interactions either through positional self-attention as in Transformers or through a single implicit decay schedule as in State-Space Models. Neither makes the multi-scale temporal structure of real user behaviour explicit. We propose MARS, an encoder-agnostic aggregation operator that consumes real timestamps and produces K summaries emphasising distinct recency scales, fused by a context-adaptive gate. MARS adds at most 6% parameters and runs in $\mathcal{O}(LdK)$ time. MARS adapts to data density by automatically selecting between two encoder instantiations: MARS-T (Transformer) for sparse data and MARS-M (Mamba) for dense data, based on the average sequence length of the training set. On five public benchmarks against ten Transformer- and Mamba-based baselines under a unified RecBole protocol, MARS attains the best HR@10 on every benchmark, with mean relative gain +19.7% over the strongest content-only Transformer baseline on sparse data (reaching +36.2% on Games) and +3.2% HR@10 / +0.9% NDCG over SIGMA on dense ML-1M at 42% fewer MFLOPs, occupying the accuracy-efficiency Pareto frontier across the data-density spectrum. A backbone-only ablation isolates the marginal contribution of MARS at +4% to +19% HR@10 on sparse data and motivates the dual-instantiation design. The code is included in the supplementary material.

</details>


### [458] [When Does Latent Reasoning Help? MeRa: Metric-Space Bias for Spatial Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03727)
*Zhenyu Yu,Shuigeng Zhou*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: 本文提出MeRa模块，证明在空间预测任务中，基于度量空间的潜在推理（而非无约束推理）能显著提升性能，并在三个空间预测基准上达到最优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究潜在推理在空间预测任务中是否有效，并发现关键在于推理是否基于底层度量空间进行约束。

Method: 提出MeRa（Metric-space Reasoning），一个轻量级、与骨干网络无关的模块，通过从成对距离中学习度量空间偏置，插入序列编码器与预测头之间进行约束推理。

Result: 在GETNext骨干上，有无度量空间偏置的推理差距达4.5% NDCG@10；MeRa在三个空间预测基准上NDCG@10均为最优，超越GeoMamba和HMST；在CLEVR实验中也验证了泛化性。

Conclusion: 度量空间约束的推理收敛到唯一不动点，且N步推理严格优于(N-1)步推理；空间预测中潜在推理必须对齐底层度量结构才有益。

Abstract: Latent reasoning has improved sequential recommendation by iteratively refining representations before prediction, but does it help spatial prediction? We find that the answer depends on whether reasoning is grounded in the underlying metric space. Without such grounding, latent reasoning degrades spatial prediction below the unmodified baseline, while a learned metric-space bias derived from pairwise distances produces consistent gains. We formalize this finding through MeRa (Metric-space Reasoning), a lightweight backbone-agnostic module that can be inserted between any sequence encoder and its prediction heads. On the GETNext backbone, the gap between reasoning without and with metric-space bias reaches 4.5% NDCG@10. MeRa achieves the best NDCG@10 on all three spatial prediction benchmarks among the compared methods, surpassing recent approaches such as GeoMamba and HMST. We prove that metric-space-constrained reasoning converges to a unique fixed point and that N-step reasoning is strictly more expressive than (N-1)-step reasoning. A controlled experiment on CLEVR with Euclidean distance confirms that the finding generalizes beyond geographic coordinates. The code is included in the supplementary material.

</details>


### [459] [Taiji: Pareto Optimal Policy Optimization with Semantics-IDs Trade-off for Industrial LLM-Enhanced Recommendation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03866)
*Yuecheng Li,Zeyu Song,Jing Yao,Chi Lu,Peng Jiang,Kun Gai*

Main category: cs.IR

TL;DR: Taiji是一个LLM-as-Enhancer框架，通过逆向工程推理和开放拒绝采样生成高质量CoT数据解决SFT瓶颈，并提出Pareto最优策略优化(POPO)在RL对齐中实现语义奖励与推荐偏好奖励的最优权衡，已在快手广告平台部署，服务超4亿日活用户。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM4Rec范式存在两大瓶颈：(1)开放域推荐中难以度量和提升SFT阶段的思维链质量；(2)RL对齐阶段忽略了LLM语义奖励与推荐偏好奖励之间的权衡。

Method: (1) SFT阶段：采用逆向工程推理和开放拒绝采样生成高质量领域特定的CoT数据；(2) RL阶段：提出Pareto最优策略优化(POPO)，自适应调整跨域奖励权重，实现语义知识与协同ID特征之间的最优权衡。

Result: 离线评估和在线A/B测试验证了有效性，自2026年5月部署于快手广告平台，服务超4亿日活用户，带来显著商业收入，展现出在Web级环境中的鲁棒可扩展性。

Conclusion: Taiji成功解决了LLM与推荐系统对齐的两大瓶颈，通过理论最优的权衡方法有效融合了LLM的语义世界知识与在线用户偏好的协同ID特征，在工业级大规模推荐场景中实现了显著的商业价值。

Abstract: Scaling recommender systems via large language models (LLMs) has become a prominent trend in the industry. However, aligning the LLM's semantic space with the recommender's ID space via post-training (e.g., SFT and RL) remains challenging. Existing LLM4Rec paradigms are bottlenecked by two main issues: (1) the difficulty of measuring and improving chain-of-thought (CoT) quality in open-domain recommendation during SFT, and (2) the neglect of the trade-off between LLM semantic rewards and recommendation preference rewards during RL alignment. Inspired by these challenges, we present Taiji, a novel LLM-as-Enhancer framework designed for industrial recommender systems. To overcome the SFT bottleneck, we utilize reverse-engineered reasoning and open-ended rejection sampling to generate high-quality, domain-specific CoT data. To resolve the RL alignment issue, we propose Pareto Optimal Policy Optimization (POPO), which adaptively adjusts cross-domain reward weights. Theoretically, it achieves an optimal trade-off between the semantic world knowledge of LLMs and the collaborative ID features representing online user preferences. Extensive offline evaluations and online A/B tests validate the effectiveness of Taiji. Deployed on Kuaishou's advertising platform since May 2026, Taiji currently serves over 400 million users daily, yielding significant commercial revenue and demonstrating its robust scalability in web-scale environments.

</details>


<div id='cs.SE'></div>

# cs.SE [[Back]](#toc)

### [460] [Acceptance-Test-Driven Evaluation Protocols for Business-Centric LLM Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02755)
*Eric Liang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向确定性机构需求的LLM系统评估协议扩展，基于验收测试驱动开发、安全工程和商业验证，将利益相关者目标转化为可执行的契约、发布门控、监控信号和证据制品，并采用"红-训练-绿"生命周期替代传统的红-绿-重构流程，确保系统在提示词、模型、检索或代理变更前满足多维门控条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM应用日益需要在依赖概率性生成组件的同时满足确定性机构需求，这种不匹配使得传统的后验基准测试（post-hoc benchmarking）不足以确保系统安全、可靠、可审计且经济有用。

Method: 提出一种评估协议扩展，包含：（1）将利益相关者目标转化为可执行的契约、发布门控、监控信号和证据制品；（2）采用"红-训练-绿"生命周期（红：定义失败的验收测试，训练：通过提示工程、检索设计、微调、护栏或数据增强改进系统，绿：满足多维门控后发布）；（3）提供治理导向的度量栈、参考架构和实证协议。

Result: 提供了一套治理导向的度量栈、参考架构和实证协议，用于对比验收测试驱动开发与传统prompt-first和benchmark-after工作流的优劣。

Conclusion: 该扩展弥补了概率性LLM组件与确定性机构需求之间的鸿沟，为需要高安全性和可审计性的生产级LLM系统提供了更可靠的评估与发布框架。

Abstract: Large language model (LLM) applications are increasingly expected to satisfy deterministic institutional requirements while relying on probabilistic generative components. This mismatch makes ordinary post-hoc benchmarking insufficient for systems that must be safe, reliable, auditable, and economically useful. This paper contributes an evaluation-protocol extension for operational LLM systems grounded in acceptance-test-driven development, safety engineering, and business-centric validation. The extension translates stakeholder goals into executable behavioral contracts, release gates, monitoring signals, and evidence artifacts before prompt, model, retrieval, or agent changes are accepted. It adapts the red-green-refactor discipline of test-driven development to a red-train-green lifecycle: first define failing acceptance tests for desired behavior, then improve the LLM system through prompt changes, retrieval design, fine-tuning, guardrails, or data augmentation, and finally release only when multidimensional gates are satisfied. The contribution is a governance-oriented metric stack, reference architecture, and empirical protocol for comparing acceptance-test-driven LLM development against prompt-first and benchmark-after workflows.

</details>


### [461] [Report on the Designing Accountable Software Systems Workshop](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02804)
*Catherine Albiston,Travis Breaux,Kat Dearstyne,Jane Cleland-Huang,Serge Egelman,Joan Feigenbaum,Lu Feng,Max Lindquist,Stephen Miner,Ruzica Piskac,Sarah Santos,Jordan Schmerge,Anmol Singhal,Maria Smith,Daniel Weitzner,Christopher Yoo*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研讨会于2024年11月召开，汇集政府、学术界和工业界利益相关者，探讨软件系统问责制的多维度问题，包括法律合规、概念模型、需求可操作化、证据保全及跨学科团队建设等，最终提出了若干研究方向。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前软件系统问责制缺乏跨学科的系统化梳理，各方利益相关者对问责制的定义、责任划分和实施路径存在模糊认识，亟需一场综合性研讨来厘清关键概念并指明研究方向。

Method: 采用协作式知识系统化方法，通过主题演讲、专题讨论和分组研讨等形式，围绕六大核心议题展开为期两天的跨学科研讨。

Result: 明确了问责制的定义与责任划分对研究可推广性的影响；指出了将问责结构转化为软件设计流程的改进需求；揭示了跨学科团队在组建、维持及跨学科学习方面面临的严峻挑战。

Conclusion: 软件系统问责制的实现需要清晰的术语定义、有效的法律-技术转化机制，以及强有力的跨学科团队支撑，未来研究应聚焦于增进立法者、监管者、企业高管与开发者之间的协同。

Abstract: The Workshop on Designing Accountable Software Systems (DASS) was convened in November 2024 with support from the U.S. National Science Foundation to engage a wide range of current and future stakeholders from government, academia, and industry on the cross-disciplinary topic of accountability in software systems. Over two days, attendees engaged in a series of panels, invited talks, and breakout sessions covering: (1) the dimensions of accountability, including legal compliance as well as business and societal aspects and drivers; (2) a conceptual model of the various structures needed to realize accountability; (3) the sources of legal requirements that affect software; (4) the operationalization of legal requirements in software; (5) the requirements to preserve evidence needed to conduct investigations; and (6) a range of challenges and contextual factors beyond software that affect why some accountability structures succeed, while others fail. The workshop was conducted as a collaborative systematization of knowledge that culminated in several research directions. The findings include the importance of clarifying definitions and responsibilities within accountable organizations, which can affect whether those researching accountability are making assumptions that limit the generalizability of findings. Further research was also identified as needed to study the ways to improve the translation of accountability structures into the software design process while improving engagement with stakeholders, such as legislators, regulators, business executives and system developers. Finally, a key finding was the high demands that DASS-like research projects place on interdisciplinary teams: both in terms of team formation and sustainment, as well as, the specific demands of cross-disciplinary learning that covers both research methods, research dissemination, and career development.

</details>


### [462] [Many a Little Makes a Mickle: A Code-Centric Empirical Study of Data Minimization Principle in Android App Development](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02960)
*Dianshu Liao,Shidong Pan,Zhenchang Xing,Xiaoyu Sun*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文聚焦于Android应用中的数据最小化原则，通过对大量应用的分析提炼出31条可操作的编码指南，并发现LLM会继承真实代码中的数据最小化风险模式，而融入指南后能有效消除这些风险。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要通过政策分析检测隐私合规差距，缺乏在代码层面为开发者提供可操作的数据最小化实现指导。

Method: 1) 对1,114个开源Android应用进行形成性研究，识别10种数据最小化场景；2) 大规模分析9,875个真实APK；3) 提炼31条编码指南；4) 评估LLM代码生成中的数据最小化风险。

Result: 现有LLM模型在Android开发中会持续复制数据最小化风险模式；引入论文的编码指南后，所有评估模型均消除了这些问题。

Conclusion: 倡导从代码级根源应对隐私监管要求，使人类编程和AI辅助编程都能更好地实现隐私合规。

Abstract: Modern mobile applications consume large amounts of data to function, raising significant privacy concerns and regulatory challenges. While prior work has primarily focused on detecting compliance gaps through policy analysis, there remains a lack of actionable guidance for developers to implement privacy principles at the code level. In this paper, we focus on data minimization as a developer-operationalizable principle and investigate its realization in Android applications. We conduct a formative study on 1,114 open-source Android apps to identify ten recurring data minimization scenarios across five data-handling stages. Building on this, we perform a large-scale analysis of 9,875 real-world APKs and distill 31 actionable coding guidelines to support privacy-compliant development. We further examine LLM-based code generation in Android development and find that state-of-the-art models consistently reproduce data minimization-risky practices, indicating that they inherit and amplify patterns from real-world code. Encouragingly, incorporating our guidelines eliminates these issues across all evaluated models. Our work advocates a shift toward responding to privacy regulatory requirements at their code-level root causes, enabling better compliance in both human and AI-assisted programming.

</details>


### [463] [SPOQ: Specialist Orchestrated Queuing for Multi-Agent Software Engineering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03115)
*Royce Carbowitz,Dheeraj Kumar*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出SPOQ方法，通过波式拓扑调度、双重验证门控和人类即代理机制，结合三层智能体层级（Opus、Sonnet、Haiku），在多智能体软件工程中实现显著的速度提升（最高14.3倍）、质量改善（缺陷率降低、测试通过率达99.87%）和人类有效监督，并在开源模型上验证了方法的通用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于多智能体的软件工程自动化方法存在三大问题：协调开销大、质量控制缺失、人类监督不足。SPOQ旨在系统性地解决这些问题。

Method: SPOQ包含三大创新：（1）基于任务依赖图的波式拓扑并行调度；（2）双重验证门控（执行前规划验证+执行后代码验证）；（3）人类即代理（HaaA）集成机制。采用三层智能体层级（Opus执行、Sonnet评审、Haiku调研）优化成本-质量权衡。

Result: 四项实验验证：（1）波式调度接近关键路径下限（比例1.03-1.11），加速比最高14.3倍；（2）规划覆盖率从93.0提升至99.75，消除循环依赖，并行度从31.0提升至75.25；（3）缺陷从0.34降至0.20/任务，测试通过率从91.25%提升至99.75%；（4）人工审查使残留缺陷从0.47降至0.03/任务。在17个仓库、8,589次提交、1,822个任务、13,866个测试上实现99.87%通过率。

Conclusion: SPOQ通过系统性的编排机制有效解决了多智能体软件工程的协调、质量和监督问题，性能提升归因于编排方法本身而非特定模型，具有良好的可迁移性和实用性。

Abstract: Multi-agent AI systems show promise for automating software engineering tasks, yet existing approaches suffer from coordination overhead, quality control gaps, and limited human oversight. We introduce SPOQ (Specialist Orchestrated Queuing), a methodology combining three innovations: (1) wave-based topological dispatch that computes parallel execution waves from task dependency graphs; (2) dual validation gates applying quality metrics before execution (planning validation) and after (code validation) to reduce rework cycles; and (3) Human-as-an-Agent (HaaA) integration, where a human specialist participates in decomposition and can be consulted during execution. SPOQ uses a three-tier agent hierarchy (Opus workers, Sonnet reviewers, Haiku investigators) to optimize cost-quality tradeoffs. We evaluate SPOQ through four experiments. Experiment 1: wave dispatch approaches the critical-path lower bound (ratio 1.03--1.11, speedup up to 14.3x); on a 2-slot local backend it delivers a stable 1.4x speedup. Experiment 2: SPOQ improves planning coverage from 93.0 to 99.75, eliminates cyclic plans, and lifts parallelism from 31.0 to 75.25. Experiment 3: dual validation reduces defects from 0.34 to 0.20 per task and lifts test pass rate from 91.25% to 99.75%. Experiment 4: human review reduces residual defects from 0.47 to 0.03 per task. Results are replicated on a locally hosted open-weights model (Qwen3.6-35B-A3B), verifying gains are attributable to orchestration rather than any specific model. A longitudinal study across 17 repositories, 8,589 commits, 1,822 tasks, and 13,866 tests (99.87% pass rate) provides ecological validation.

</details>


### [464] [AlgoTouch: An Execution-Centered Approach to Incremental Construction of Imperative Programs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03349)
*Michel Adam,Patrice Frison,Sabine Letellier Zarshenas,Moncef Daoud*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出AlgoTouch，一个基于执行的系统，允许开发者通过直接操作程序数据来增量构建命令式程序，并自动生成Python、C、C++、Java等主流语言的正确代码。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统命令式编程需要开发者预先设想指令对数据状态的影响，认知负荷高且易出错，尤其在前期的增量开发阶段。本文旨在通过执行驱动的方式降低编程门槛和错误率。

Method: AlgoTouch通过执行具体的数据变换来构建程序，记录执行行为并转化为内部中间表示。系统利用显式的概念机器暴露数据存储、计算和控制流。控制结构的合成是确定性的：条件语句来自观察到的比较，迭代行为封装为循环宏，支持非线性增量构建。部分和不完整程序可执行、精化并完成，同时保持语义一致性。

Result: 在代表性算法基准上通过了工程级验证，证明了正确性、表现力、鲁棒性和语言无关性。系统能自动生成Python、C、C++、Java等主流命令式语言的可读程序。

Conclusion: 该工作将执行、构建和代码生成整合到统一架构中，提出了一种交互式程序构建的新模型，贡献了一类以执行为中心的开发系统范式。

Abstract: Program construction in imperative languages remains largely based on writing textual code that specifies sequences of instructions operating on program data. This approach requires developers to anticipate the effects of instructions on evolving data states, which increases cognitive load and the likelihood of errors during early and incremental development. This paper presents AlgoTouch, an execution-based system for incremental construction of imperative programs through direct manipulation of program data. Rather than assembling syntactic structures, programs are constructed by executing concrete data transformations that are recorded and incorporated into an internal intermediate representation. AlgoTouch relies on an explicit notional machine that exposes data storage, computation, and control flow, enabling continuous alignment between observed execution and program structure. A central contribution of the system lies in its deterministic synthesis of control structures from execution behavior. Conditional statements are derived from observed comparisons, while iterative behaviors are encapsulated in loop macros that support non-linear and incremental construction. This design enables partial and incomplete programs to be executed, refined, and completed while preserving semantic consistency. AlgoTouch automatically generates correct and readable programs in several mainstream imperative languages, including Python, C, C++, and Java. The system is evaluated through engineering-level validation on a representative set of algorithmic benchmarks, demonstrating correctness, expressiveness, robustness, and language independence. By integrating execution, construction, and code generation within a unified architecture, this work introduces an alternative model for interactive program construction and contributes a new class of execution-centered development systems.

</details>


### [465] [Neural Change Prediction: Relating Software Changes to Their Effects and Vice Versa](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03378)
*Laura Plein,Souhila Zidane,Jordan Samhi,Andreas Zeller*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出神经变化预测技术，通过学习代码变更与程序行为变化之间的关联，实现无需执行代码即可预测变更效果，并支持特征定位、软件演化和缺陷修复等任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 软件工程中理解变更与效果之间的关系至关重要，但现有方法难以在不执行代码的情况下预测代码语义变更的影响。

Method: 自动对程序施加大量变异并观察输出变化，收集(变更, 行为变化)配对数据，构建神经网络模型，支持双向预测：从期望行为变化反推代码变更位置与方式，以及从代码变更预测输出影响。

Result: 在CSS配置文件和Python程序上进行了案例研究与评估，验证了该方法的通用性和广泛适用性。

Conclusion: 该方法完全自动化，无需代码先验知识或语义理解，适用于任何可执行且可观察输出的软件制品，但需要大量变异和执行。

Abstract: Much of software development revolves around understanding the relationship between software changes and their effects. If we could learn and predict those relationships, such predictions could benefit several areas of software engineering. While recent advances in artificial intelligence have shown great promise in software engineering tasks, predicting the semantics of code without executing it remains a big challenge. In this paper, we present Neural Change Prediction, a novel and fundamental technique to learn and predict associations between software changes and their dynamic effects on program behavior. Specifically, for a given program and test inputs, we automatically apply numerous mutations to the code and observe how these changes alter the program's output. From these (changes to software, changes in behavior)-pairs, we create models that: (1) for a desired change in behavior, predict where and how the code should be changed (feature localization, software evolution, and software repair); and (2) for a given code change, predict how this code change affects the output (effect prediction). We have conducted a detailed case study on CSS configuration files and an evaluation on Python programs to demonstrate the generality and wide applicability of Neural Change Prediction. While Neural Change Prediction requires numerous mutations (and thus numerous executions of the program under test), Neural Change Prediction is fully automatic and does not require any prior knowledge of the code or its semantics, making it applicable to any software artifact that can be executed and whose output can be observed.

</details>


### [466] [Human-AI Collaboration and the Transformation of Software Engineering Work](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03394)
*Mamdouh Alenezi*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文通过综合多源证据，系统分析了生成式AI和智能Agent如何将软件工程从人类编写代码转向人类指导、验证和管理自主系统的范式。提出了一个包含技术、认知、社会技术、治理和组织五大能力维度的胜任力框架，并推导出九个可验证命题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着GenAI和Agentic AI的兴起，软件工程的核心活动正在从人工编码转向对自主/半自主系统的指导与治理，现有研究缺乏对这一转变的系统性理解及对未来工程师能力需求的理论框架。

Method: 采用结构化解释性综合方法，基于近期同行评审和档案研究的多元证据库（包括大规模自主编码Agent在开源仓库提交数十万PR的实证观察），对三种共存范式（传统、GenAI辅助、Agentic AI辅助）进行刻画。

Result: 映射了哪些传统活动被自动化、哪些被增强、哪些是新出现的；提出了一个包含技术、认知、社会技术、治理和组织五大类能力的原创胜任力框架，以及对应的能力矩阵和转型框架；推导出九个可实证检验的命题。

Conclusion: 代码将变得充足，软件工程师的持久价值在于意图规范、批判性判断和可问责的监督，而非产出代码的数量。研究为理论、行业劳动力转型、大学课程和组织领导力提供了启示。

Abstract: The integration of Generative AI (GenAI) and Agentic AI into software development is reconfiguring software engineering from an activity centered on human authorship of code into a discipline centered on directing, verifying, and governing autonomous and semi-autonomous systems. Drawing on a curated, multi-source evidence base of recent peer-reviewed and archival studies -- including large-scale empirical observations of autonomous coding agents contributing hundreds of thousands of pull requests to open-source repositories -- this paper synthesizes how the locus of engineering work is shifting from individual coding productivity toward human--AI collaboration, agent orchestration, verification and validation, governance, and socio-technical systems thinking. We adopt a structured interpretive synthesis to characterize three coexisting paradigms: Traditional, Generative AI-Enabled, and Agentic AI-Enabled software engineering. We map which traditional activities are being automated, which are being augmented, and which are newly emerging, and we trace plausible role trajectories over the next decade. The paper's principal contribution is an original, theory-driven competency framework that organizes the capabilities required of future engineers into five interacting categories -- % technical, cognitive, socio-technical, governance, and organizational -- % operationalized through a competency matrix and a transformation framework linking paradigm shifts to capability demands. We derive nine empirically testable propositions and articulate implications for theory, industry workforce transformation, university curricula, and organizational leadership. We argue that, as code becomes abundant, the durable value of the software engineer increasingly resides in intent specification, critical judgment, and accountable oversight rather than in the sheer volume of code produced.

</details>


### [467] [Multi-Modal Assessment of Road Roughness Using Smartphone Applications, Acceleration, and Passenger Ratings](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03427)
*Novel Certada,Amirhesam Aghanouri,Joseba Gorospe,Cristina Olaverri-Monreal*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文研究了基于多模态和人类感知的低成本路面粗糙度评估框架，通过智能手机IRI、车载GNSS-IMU测量和乘客评分三种数据源，在1700公里实测中验证了各方法的相关性与局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统路面粗糙度评估依赖昂贵专业设备，成本高、覆盖面有限。本文旨在探索利用智能手机和人类感知等低成本替代方案进行大规模道路监测的可行性。

Method: 在奥地利、匈牙利和罗马尼亚1700公里真实交通条件下，同步收集：1)两款智能手机应用的IRI估计值；2)车载GNSS-IMU测量数据；3)乘客PSR评分。采用相关性分析、ICC和Bland-Altman方法评估应用间一致性。

Result: 两款智能手机应用间相关性较强但存在系统性偏差，不可互换使用；IRI与PSR呈显著负相关，验证了人类对粗糙度的感知敏感性；IRI与垂直加速度正相关，确认了路面不平与车辆动力学的物理联系。

Conclusion: 低成本消费级传感和人类感知评估在路面粗糙度监测中面临挑战，尚不能完全替代专业设备，但多模态融合方案具有潜力。

Abstract: This paper investigates a multi-modal and human-centric framework for low-cost road roughness assessment. The evaluation was based on three complementary data sources: smartphone-based International Roughness Index (IRI) estimates from two independent smartphone-based applications; in-vehicle GNSS-IMU Receiver (Global Navigation Satellite System Receiver with Inertial Measurement Unit) measurements, and passenger Present Serviceability Ratings (PSR). Data were collected over 1700 km across Austria, Hungary, and Romania under real traffic conditions. Inter-application agreement was evaluated using correlation analysis, Intraclass Correlation Coefficient (ICC), and Bland-Altman methods. While the two smartphone applications show strong correlation, systematic bias limits their interchangeability. A significant inverse relationship between IRI and PSR confirms perceptual sensitivity to roughness, and positive correlations between IRI and vertical acceleration validate the physical linkage between pavement irregularities and vehicle dynamics. The results demonstrate the challenges of integrating consumer-grade sensing and perception-based evaluation for road roughness monitoring as an alternative to high-cost specialized survey equipment.

</details>


### [468] [Making Embodied AI Reliable: A Community Agenda from Testing to Formal Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03593)
*Xi Zheng,Dulanga Weerakoon,Yintong Huo,Teresa Yeo,Guy Van Den Broeck,Vijay Ganesh,Daniel Neider,Biplav Srivastava,Ivan Ruchkin,Archan Misra,Corina Pasareanu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文基于AAAI'26 Bridge Program的讨论，提出具身AI的可靠性本质上是一个生命周期保障问题，并阐述了通过场景测试、组合验证和运行时保障三个互补方向，以及整合这些方法的神经符号表征与持续反馈机制来实现可靠具身AI的路线图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 具身AI系统在开放世界环境中部署越来越多，但其可靠性保障面临根本性挑战，现有方法各自独立，缺乏系统性整合。

Method: 提出三管齐下的框架：(1)基于有效规范和覆盖度量的可信场景测试；(2)借助结构化符号表征的组合验证；(3)适应不确定性和分布偏移的运行时保障机制。强调通过共享神经符号表征和持续反馈实现三者整合。

Result: 给出了一个集成化保障工作流的理论框架，将测试、验证和运行时自适应通过神经符号表征连接起来，覆盖系统全生命周期。

Conclusion: 整合的保障方法为在复杂真实环境中安全可靠运行的具身AI系统奠定了基础。

Abstract: Embodied AI systems are increasingly deployed in open-world environments, yet ensuring their reliability remains a fundamental challenge. Drawing on discussions from the AAAI'26 Bridge Program on "Making Embodied AI Reliable with Testing and Formal Verification", this article argues that reliability in embodied AI is inherently a lifecycle assurance problem arising from uncertainty, human interaction, and emergent behaviors across tightly coupled system components. We identify three complementary directions toward reliable embodied AI: (1) trustworthy scenario-based testing supported by validated specifications and meaningful coverage metrics, (2) compositional verification enabled by structured symbolic representations of system behavior and environmental context, and (3) runtime assurance mechanisms capable of adapting to uncertainty and distribution shifts during deployment. Rather than treating these approaches independently, we advocate integrated assurance workflows that connect testing, verification, and runtime adaptation through shared neuro-symbolic representations and continuous feedback across the system lifecycle. Such integration provides a foundation for building trustworthy embodied AI systems that can operate safely and reliably in complex real-world environments.

</details>


### [469] [DDOR: Delta Debugging for Explainable Overrefusal Testing and Repair](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03601)
*Qinyan Zhou,Peixin Zhang,Jun Sun,Haonan Zhang,Dongxia Wang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DDOR是一个全自动、可解释的黑盒框架，利用delta调试定位LLM过度拒绝的最小触发片段(mRTFs)，并基于此生成测试集和进行提示修复，在保持安全性的同时减少过度拒绝。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全对齐和护栏机制在帮助LLM避免有害输出的同时，也会导致过度拒绝——即错误地拒绝本无害但看似有风险的查询。现有方法缺乏自动化、可解释的测试与修复方案。

Method: 采用delta调试技术定位最小拒绝触发片段(mRTFs)作为短语级可解释证据；基于mRTFs生成多样化上下文丰富的提示；通过多验证器过滤不安全或模糊案例；利用mRTFs进行有针对性的提示修复。

Result: 为每个模型生成约1000个可扩展、模型特异的过度拒绝测试用例；通过定位的mRTFs进行提示修复，显著降低过度拒绝，同时保留原始意图并维持对真正有害输入的安全性。

Conclusion: DDOR提供了一个实用的端到端解决方案，既能评估又能缓解LLM的过度拒绝问题，在不牺牲安全性的前提下提升LLM的可用性。

Abstract: While safety alignment and guardrails help large language models (LLMs) avoid harmful outputs, they can also induce overrefusal, i.e., unwarranted rejection of benign queries that merely appear risky. We present DDOR (Delta Debugging for OverRefusal), a fully automated and explainable framework for overrefusal testing and repair in a black-box setting, where only model inputs and outputs are accessible and internal safety mechanisms remain opaque. DDOR applies delta debugging to localize minimal refusal-triggering fragments (mRTFs) that provide phrase-level, explainable evidence for why a refusal occurs. Conditioned on these mRTFs, DDOR generates diverse, context-rich prompts and performs multi-oracle validation to filter intrinsically unsafe or ambiguous cases, producing scalable and model-specific overrefusal test suites (approximately 1K cases per model). Beyond evaluation, we further leverage localized mRTFs to perform targeted prompt repair, substantially reducing overrefusal while preserving the original intent and maintaining safety on genuinely harmful inputs. Overall, DDOR offers a practical end-to-end solution to both evaluate and mitigate overrefusal, improving LLM usability without sacrificing safety.

</details>


### [470] [Can AI be Easy? Lessons Learned from the EZR.py Toolkit](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03640)
*Tim Menzies,Srinath Srinivasan*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出EZR.py（400行代码），通过阅读和重构AI工具，将多种机器学习算法简化为统一的小型工具包。在120+表格软件工程优化任务上，EZR在性能上媲美甚至超越SHAP、LIME、SMAC3等先进工具，运行速度快500倍，且所需标注数据更少，论证了在表格SE优化领域，阅读代码仍有重要价值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 反驳"开发者不再需要阅读代码"的流行观点，证明在表格软件工程优化任务中，通过阅读和重构代码可以产生深刻洞见，构建出简洁高效的工具。

Method: 开发EZR.py（400行Python代码），通过反复阅读和重构AI工具，将朴素贝叶斯、k-means聚类、CART决策树、模拟退火、局部搜索、主动学习、互补贝叶斯文本挖掘等多种算法统一化、简化实现。

Result: 在MOOT仓库120+任务上测试，EZR性能与SHAP、LIME、SMAC3、FASTREAD等相当或更优，运行速度比SMAC3快500倍，使用更少标注数据，能从数千变量中构建少于十个变量的决策树。

Conclusion: 在表格SE优化范围内，阅读和重构代码是产生洞见的有效方法，小型统一工具包可以媲美大型库。

Abstract: Much recent press claims that developers no longer need to read code. We disagree, at least within the domain of tabular software-engineering (SE) optimization tasks: rows of $x$ and $y$ values where the $y$ values are expensive to obtain.
  As evidence we present 400 lines of EZR.py, a Python toolkit (no heavy dependencies) that implements Naive Bayes, $k$-means clustering, classification and regression trees, simulated annealing, local search, active learning, and complementary-Bayes text-mining relevance filtering for tabular SE data. EZR was built by repeatedly reading and refactoring AI tools to simplify and unify them. The result demonstrates that many seemingly different learning algorithms are nearly the same once stripped back to their core: classical algorithms collapse to a few lines each, and a state-of-the-art active learner fits in roughly 80 lines.
  Tested on the 120+ tabular SE optimization tasks in the MOOT repository, these tiny tools perform as well as or better than state-of-the-art explanation tools (SHAP, LIME), the SMAC3 optimizer, and SVM-based text-mining filters (FASTREAD), while running 500$\times$ faster than SMAC3, using orders of magnitude less labelled data, and building trees from fewer than ten variables even when thousands are available.
  We conclude that, within the scope of tabular SE optimization, reading and refactoring code is a useful method of generating insight, and small unified toolkits can rival large libraries.
  EZR is available under an open-source license. Install via \textsf{pip install ezr}; example data at \textsf{github.com/timm/moot}.

</details>


### [471] [Agentic Generation and Evolution of Knowledge Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03662)
*Man Zhang,Tao Yue,Nazareno M. Aguirre,Diego Garbervetsky,Sebastian Uchitel*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出TrustModel愿景，通过三个智能子系统（建模、一致性、演化）实现知识模型的智能生成与持续演化，保障复杂软件系统在动态环境中的可信性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 复杂软件系统（如自动驾驶、机器人）与动态环境持续交互，其知识模型可能因系统演化而变得不完整、不一致或过时，亟需一种能自主保持知识模型与系统同步的机制。

Method: TrustModel包含三个智能子系统：Modeling（构建与更新知识模型）、Conformance（评估模型与系统/环境的一致性）、Evolution（生成演化指导以同步变更）。

Result: 通过模型驱动测试实例展示了TrustModel的可行性，并讨论了其在需求监控、架构漂移追踪、变更影响评估等MDE活动中的潜在应用。

Conclusion: TrustModel将活知识模型作为持续演化软件系统可信工程的基础，为保障系统可靠性提供了新范式。

Abstract: Complex software systems such as autonomous vehicles, robotics increasingly interact with dynamic physical, cyber, and social environments. Reasoning about their behavior, maintaining them under continuous change, and evolving them safely require trustworthy knowledge about the system, its assumptions, and its operating context. Knowledge models (KMs) provide a practical basis for such reasoning, but they may themselves become incomplete, inconsistent, or outdated as systems evolve. This paper presents TrustModel, a vision for the agentic generation and evolution of living KMs. TrustModel comprises three agentic subsystems: Modeling, for constructing and updating KMs; Conformance, for assessing their alignment with the system and its environment; and Evolution, for generating guidance to keep KMs synchronized with emerging changes. We demonstrate how TrustModel can be instantiated for model-based testing and discuss its potential for supporting other MDE activities, such as requirements and assumption monitoring, architectural drift tracking, and change impact assessment. Overall, TrustModel positions living KMs as a foundation for dependable engineering of continuously evolving software systems.

</details>


### [472] [An AutomationML Domain Library for the Formalized Process Description](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03691)
*Hamied Nabizada,Rainer Drath,Felix Gehlhoff,Alexander Fay*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于AutomationML的VDI/VDE 3682形式化过程描述(FPD)领域库，实现了FPD元素的标准化机器可读数据交换，并开发了双向映射工具验证其可用性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FPD虽然提供了标准化的图形化过程描述符号，但缺乏工具无关的机器可读数据格式，限制了跨工程域的过程模型交换。

Method: 基于CAEX 3.0元模型构建FPD的AML领域库，包含RoleClassLib、InterfaceClassLib、两个AttributeTypeLibs和SystemUnitClassLib五个子库，并开发了Web端FPD建模器与AML格式的双向映射工具。

Result: 成功构建了完整的AML领域库，并通过双向映射工具验证了其在Web端FPD建模器与AML之间的互操作性。

Conclusion: 该领域库被提议作为VDI/VDE 3682第3部分的候选标准，并已公开发布供社区反馈和标准化前验证。

Abstract: The Formalized Process Description (FPD) according to VDI/VDE 3682 provides a standardized graphical notation for describing processes across engineering domains but lacks a standardized, tool-independent data format for machine-readable model exchange. This paper presents an AutomationML (AML) domain library that formalizes the complete set of FPD language elements, their attributes, connection semantics, and graphical representation information as class libraries based on the Computer Aided Engineering Exchange (CAEX) 3.0 metamodel. The library comprises five interrelated parts: a RoleClassLib defining the semantic roles, an InterfaceClassLib for connection types, two AttributeTypeLibs for the information model and diagram interchange, and a SystemUnitClassLib providing instantiation templates. Key design decisions regarding inheritance, diagram structure, hierarchical decomposition, and the representation of graphical information are discussed along with the alternatives that were considered. A bidirectional mapping tool demonstrates the library's applicability by converting between a web-based FPD modeler and AML. The library is proposed as a candidate for Part 3 of VDI/VDE 3682. It is available together with an example and a feedback function for community input ahead of standardization at https://aml.fpbjs.net.

</details>


### [473] [FLARE: Fine-Grained Diagnostic Feedback for LLM Code Refinement](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03852)
*Yinsheng Yao,Hongxiang Zhang,Weixi Tong,Tianyi Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Flare是一个迭代式代码调试框架，通过轻量级诊断模型预测行级可疑度信号，指导大语言模型进行代码错误定位和修复。在五个基座大模型上的实验表明，Flare显著优于现有方法，候选搜索进一步提升了性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有代码修复方法依赖测试失败或自我批评等反馈信号，但这些信号过于粗粒度或高层，无法有效告知模型具体的错误位置，导致修复效率低下。

Method: Flare框架包含一个轻量级诊断模型，能够预测行级可疑度（suspiciousness）信号，用于精准定位错误。考虑到诊断预测固有的不确定性，Flare在Top-K个可疑区域进行搜索，根据执行结果选出最佳候选方案。

Result: 在LiveCodeBench和BigCodeBench上，不进行候选搜索（k=1）时，Flare以1.72%到7.42%的绝对提升超越最强基线；搜索10个候选带来平均8.50%的额外提升；诊断模型本身也优于现有故障定位方法。

Conclusion: 行级细粒度诊断信号能够有效指导代码修复，Flare的轻量级诊断模型提供了可靠且可解释的错误定位能力，显著提升了LLM代码生成的正确性。

Abstract: Large language models often generate code with bugs. Existing methods rely on feedback signals such as test failures and self-critiques to iteratively refine the generated code. Such signals are either too coarse-grained or too high-level, which is not sufficient to inform the model where to fix the bug. In this work, we present Flare, an iterative framework with a lightweight diagnostic model that predicts line-level suspiciousness signals for bug localization and code refinement. Given the inherent uncertainty of diagnostic predictions, Flare searches over the top-k suspicious regions and selects the best candidate according to execution outcomes. Experiments on LiveCodeBench and BigCodeBench with five base LLMs show that, even without candidate search (k=1), Flare outperforms the strongest baseline with an absolute improvement from 1.72% to 7.42%. Furthermore, searching over 10 candidates yields an average improvement of 8.50% compared with no candidate search. When evaluated in isolation, our lightweight diagnostic model achieves the best performance compared with recent fault localization methods, demonstrating that it can provide reliable fine-grained guidance for code refinement.

</details>


### [474] [The Impact of Configuring Agentic AI Coding Tools on Build-vs-Buy Decisions: A Study Protocol](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03907)
*Jai Lal Lulla,Matthias Galster,Jie M. Zhang,Sebastian Baltes,Christoph Treude*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一项预先注册的实验协议，系统研究两大类Agentic AI编码工具（Claude Code和OpenAI Codex）在不同配置机制（如上下文文件、Skills、MCP工具、权限控制）下如何影响其"自建还是购买"（即自行实现功能还是引入外部库）决策，以及这些决策对安全、许可、性能和可维护性的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Agentic AI编码工具在越来越自主地编写代码时，会决定是自行实现功能还是导入外部库（build-versus-buy），这一决策对软件安全、许可合规、性能和长期可维护性有直接影响。但目前尚无受控实验研究探究什么因素支配这些工具的此类决策，以及开发者最有效的配置机制是什么。

Method: 作者提出一个预注册实验协议：使用Claude Code和OpenAI Codex两种工具，在结构化基准测试项目中执行受控编程任务，每个任务围绕可识别的build-versus-buy决策点构建；操控配置变量（无配置、上下文文件中的软偏好和明确禁止、Skills指令、MCP启用库发现工具、权限控制）；测量工具选择了哪些库、是否披露新引入的库及披露的完整性和准确性；通过9个预先注册的假设来结构化分析。

Result: 目前为协议阶段，尚未给出实验结果。预期产出包括一个可复用的基准数据集和分析流程，用于评估Agentic AI编码工具中的build-versus-buy行为。

Conclusion: 该预注册协议系统性地填补了Agentic AI编码工具在build-versus-buy决策研究方面的空白，为理解配置机制如何影响工具行为提供了实验框架，并为后续安全合规评估提供了可复用的基准资源。

Abstract: Agentic AI coding tools write code with increasing autonomy and in doing so decide when to import a library and when to implement functionality from scratch. These decisions, whether to build functionality from scratch or buy into an external library, hereafter build-versus-buy, carry direct consequences for software security, licensing compliance, performance, and long-term maintainability. Yet no controlled experimental study has examined what governs build-versus-buy decisions in agentic AI coding tools. Configuration mechanisms, i.e., the means by which developers tailor agentic AI coding tool behavior to a project or workflow, are one of the primary means by which practitioners can influence these decisions. However, it is unclear which configuration mechanisms influence build-versus-buy decisions most effectively. We present a pre-registered protocol to study how configuration mechanisms alter build-versus-buy behavior in two popular agentic AI coding tools: Claude Code and OpenAI Codex. We will execute controlled programming tasks drawn from a benchmark of staged projects, each constructed around identifiable build-versus-buy points, and will manipulate the configuration supplied to each tool, ranging from no configuration, through context files with soft preferences and explicit prohibitions, to Skills (instructions that can be autonomously discovered), MCP-enabled library discovery tools, and permission controls, measuring which libraries the tool selects, whether it discloses newly introduced libraries, and whether those disclosures are complete and accurate. Nine pre-registered hypotheses structure the protocol. The resulting benchmark dataset and analysis pipeline will be released as a reusable artifact for evaluating build-versus-buy behavior in agentic AI coding tools.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [475] [Democracy on Rugged Landscapes: Phase Transitions in Optimal Voting Rules](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02813)
*Joshua Nunley*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文通过NK适应度景观模型，研究了不同投票方法在直接民主和代议民主下的表现，发现最优投票方法随景观复杂性发生相变，Borda计数在大部分参数空间表现最佳，而代议民主下计分投票占主导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究对投票方法在复杂制度-个体相互作用下的表现缺乏系统理解，尤其是不同投票方法如何应对法律与个人特质相互依赖的复杂环境。

Method: 使用NK适应度景观建模，将集体治理视为优化问题：共享位（法律）通过投票更新，个体位（个人特质）固定。引入交叉依赖参数α控制立法效果对个体情况的依赖程度，比较8种标准投票方法及广义评分族，在景观崎岖度K和α参数空间中进行大规模仿真（每种配置1000次运行）。

Result: 直接民主下最优投票方法发生相变：计分投票在平滑景观占优，序数评分（p=0.35）在低-中崎岖度占优，Borda计数在广泛中间范围占优，STAR投票在最高复杂度占优。Borda计数在大部分参数空间实现最高平均适应度及最低方差。代议民主下，计分投票在多数情况下占主导，多元投票在高身份权重β和低-中候选人自利性p_self下表现最优。

Conclusion: 不同投票方法在复杂治理环境中的表现高度依赖于制度与个体相互作用的复杂性，不存在普适最优的投票方法；Borda计数在直接民主中稳健性最强，而代议民主结构显著改变了投票方法的选择偏好。

Abstract: Laws and institutions shape individual outcomes through complex interactions with citizens' diverse circumstances, yet how different voting methods navigate this coupled landscape remains poorly understood. We model collective governance as optimization on NK fitness landscapes, where shared bits (laws) are updated by voting while individual bits (personal traits) remain fixed. A cross-dependency parameter $α$ controls how legislation's effects depend on individual circumstances. We compare eight standard voting methods and a generalized scoring family across landscape ruggedness $K \in \{1,\ldots,20\}$ and $α\in [0,1]$ with 1000 runs per configuration.
  Under direct democracy, the optimal voting method undergoes sharp phase transitions as a function of landscape complexity: cardinal score voting dominates on smooth landscapes, ordinal scoring with $p=0.35$ at low-to-moderate ruggedness, Borda count across a wide middle range, and STAR voting at the highest complexity. A two-parameter empirical formula reduces the $(K, α)$ plane to a single complexity axis for visualization. Borda count achieves the highest mean fitness and lowest variance across most of the parameter space.
  We further introduce a representative democracy model parameterized by identity weight $β$ and candidate self-interest $p_{\mathrm{self}}$. Representation reshapes the complexity-dependent structure even under favorable conditions: cardinal score voting dominates across most regimes, with plurality emerging as the top method at high $β$ and low-to-moderate $p_{\mathrm{self}}$.

</details>


### [476] [Do Matching Mechanisms Work with LLM Agents?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03030)
*Yukihiro Hoshino,Ayato Kitadai,Nariaki Nishino*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究LLM代理市场中的匹配机制，发现基于机制的市场优于自由谈判，但策略证明性并不总能保证真实报告偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 检验标准匹配机制在LLM代理市场中是否如预期般运作，因为LLM代理作为委托决策者做出分配决策，与传统人类参与者可能不同。

Method: 比较了分散式自由谈判市场与集中式基于机制的市场（包括DA、EADA、TTC等机制），在一对一匹配环境中进行受控实验。

Result: 基于机制的市场在稳定性和效率上普遍优于自由谈判；LLM代理在DA和EADA中比人类更倾向于真实报告偏好；TTC虽为策略证明机制，但并未始终比EADA引发更高的真实报告率。

Conclusion: 匹配理论为LLM代理市场设计提供了有用但不完整的指导，策略证明性并非在LLM市场中充分保证真实报告偏好的条件。

Abstract: This study examines whether standard matching mechanisms function as intended in LLM-agent markets, where LLM agents make allocation-related decisions as delegated decision-makers. We compare decentralized free-negotiation markets with centralized mechanism-based markets including several representative mechanisms. Across controlled one-to-one matching environments, mechanism-based markets generally outperform free negotiation in terms of stability and efficiency. We also find that LLM agents report preferences truthfully at substantially higher rates than human subjects in comparable DA and EADA environments. However, truth-telling is not uniformly aligned with formal strategy-proofness across all mechanisms: TTC, despite being strategy-proof, does not always elicit higher truth-telling than EADA. These results suggest that matching theory provides a useful but incomplete guide for designing institutions in LLM-agent markets.

</details>


### [477] [Competitive Information Design in Sequential Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03527)
*Zhicheng Du,Hu Fu,Ying Qin,Zihe Wang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究竞争性环境下广告商的信息披露策略，扩展了Anderson和Renault(2006)的模型至水平差异化竞争场景，证明存在均衡并刻画了对称均衡的特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典模型仅考虑垄断情况，但现实中广告商面临竞争，消费者可以进行顺序搜索。作者希望理解在竞争性环境中，广告商如何策略性地披露信息以吸引消费者。

Method: 基于对偶论证的方法验证信息策略是否为最佳响应；运用Weitzman索引算法描述消费者的最优顺序搜索行为；通过均衡分析研究竞争性信息设计。

Result: 在先验分布无质量点时证明了均衡存在性；在先验分布单调递增密度的情形下，完整刻画了对称均衡的特征。

Conclusion: 竞争性环境中的信息设计均衡可能呈现复杂行为，但对称均衡具有清晰的经济直觉结构，为广告竞争中的信息披露策略提供了理论指导。

Abstract: Advertisements often strategically disclose information to consumers who make decisions on further information acquisition and eventual purchase. Anderson and Renault (2006) model this problem using an information design framework, where the advertiser acts as a sender and the consumer as a receiver. We extend this model to a competitive setting with horizontally differentiated senders competing for a unit-demand receiver. Under costly inspection, the receiver's optimal sequential search action is given by Weitzman's Index Algorithm.
  We give a method, based on duality arguments, to verify whether a sender's given information strategy constitutes a best response against his competitors (other senders). We establish the existence of an equilibrium in the game among senders when the prior distributions have no mass; we also illustrate that such equilibria may exhibit intricate behaviors. Finally, we meticulously characterize symmetric equilibria played by the senders for cases when the prior distributions have monotone increasing densities, while offering economic intuitions behind the insightful equilibrium structure.

</details>


### [478] [Reserve Depletion and Security Runway in Proof-of-Stake Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03587)
*Paolo Penna,Manvir Schneider*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究PoS协议中，交易费与预留代币储备共同资助验证者奖励时的动态过渡问题。通过构建离散时间随机模型，推导出状态依赖的最低储备阈值，区分不可行、储备依赖安全和仅需费用安全三个区域，并提供压力测试保障与失败概率界限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PoS协议早期交易费不足以支撑安全目标，需依赖储备代币；后期费用可能足够。核心问题是储备能否支撑协议安全度过这一过渡期，现有方法仅依赖名义耗尽日期或稳态比率，缺乏动态风险评估框架。

Method: 建立离散时间随机模型，包含波动的代币价格与交易需求，验证者策略性选择参与。求解验证者进入博弈，推导出精确的状态依赖储备阈值，并扩展到前瞻性验证者场景，推导马尔可夫参与条件。

Result: 得到三个安全区域划分；给出将价格与需求置信下界转化为储备要求的压力测试保障；获得显式的失败概率与期望过渡时间界限；证明名义储备大未必安全，费用需求达标后储备冗余。

Conclusion: 储备政策不应仅看名义耗尽日期或稳态比率，需采用动态均衡框架进行压力测试。协议可能在储备名义充足时仍面临安全失败风险，而一旦交易需求跨过费用门槛，储备对安全变得多余。

Abstract: Many proof-of-stake protocols finance validator rewards from two sources: transaction fees and a finite reserve of tokens. This creates a dynamic hand-off problem. Early in the life of the system, fees may be too small to fund the target level of security; later, fees may become sufficient. The central question is whether the reserve provides enough runway for the protocol to remain secure until this fee-only region is reached. We study this problem in a discrete-time stochastic model of validator participation. Token price and transaction demand fluctuate over time, while validators choose participation strategically. We solve the validator entry game and derive an exact state-dependent reserve threshold, i.e., the minimal reserve stock necessary and sufficient to sustain a target security level. This threshold separates three regions: infeasibility, reserve-dependent security, and fee-only security. Security fails if the reserve first falls below the state-dependent threshold, and a successful hand-off occurs exactly if the fee-only region is reached before that failure time. We derive stress-test guarantees that convert lower confidence bands for token price and demand into reserve requirements, and obtain explicit failure-probability and expected hand-off-time bounds. Finally, we extend the model to forward-looking validators and derive the Markov participation condition that captures how current participation affects future reserve-funded rewards. The main implication is that reserve policy should not be evaluated by nominal depletion dates or steady-state reward ratios alone. A protocol can have a large nominal reserve and still be close to security failure after adverse price or demand shocks. Conversely, once demand crosses the fee-only threshold, the reserve becomes redundant for security. This paper provides a tractable equilibrium framework for stress-testing this transition.

</details>


### [479] [Causal Mirage Equilibrium in Agentic Machine Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03636)
*Hamidou Tembine*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文引入风险敏感平均场型“因果幻象均衡”（CME），形式化描述了生成式机器智能中语义表征与物理现实因果解耦的现象，并证明当内生强化主导因果锚定时，系统会从有根均衡失稳，进入稳定的无根语义流形。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典博弈论假设智能体的内部表征与外部状态保持因果联系，但在生成式机器智能中这一假设不成立——语义表征可能脱离物理现实，形成自我强化的稳定构型。本文旨在形式化刻画这一现象。

Method: 提出风险敏感平均场型博弈框架下的“因果幻象均衡”（CME）；定义无量纲参数“幻象强度”衡量语义脱离程度；利用Kakutani-Glicksberg-Fan不动点定理证明CME存在性；建立非线性幻象分岔定理。

Result: 证明当内生强化（reinforcement-confidence）主导因果锚定时，唯一有根均衡失稳，产生稳定的无根状态不变流形。合成共识与因果脱离的语义构型是结构稳定的风险感知吸引子，而非临时优化异常。

Conclusion: 生成式智能中语义脱离不是偶然现象，而是递归自回归动态下结构稳定、风险敏感的均衡结果，对理解AI认知机制有重要意义。

Abstract: Classical game-theoretic solution concepts assume that agents' internal representations remain causally linked to external states. In generative machine intelligence, this assumption fails: semantic representations can decouple from physical reality, stabilizing into self-reinforcing, operationally robust configurations. This paper introduces the risk-sensitive mean-field-type \emph{Causal Mirage Equilibrium} (CME), a solution refined concept formalizing endogenous epistemic decoupling within a risk-sensitive mean-field-type game. Unlike Nash, Bayesian, self-confirming, or robust equilibria, CME stabilizes detached semantic representation manifolds rather than optimization strategies or observational beliefs. To quantify this phenomenon, we define a dimensionless parameter, the \emph{mirage intensity} which measures semantic detachment as the ratio of an agent's endogenous reinforcement-confidence product to its causally grounded reality alignment. Under compactness, convexity, and continuity assumptions on the game primitives, we prove the existence of an CME using the Kakutani-Glicksberg-Fan fixed-point theorem on the space of joint probability measures. We establish a non-linear mirage bifurcation theorem: when endogenous reinforcement dominates causal grounding, the unique grounded fixed point becomes unstable, giving rise to a stable invariant manifold of ungrounded states. Our results demonstrate that synthetic consensus and causally detached semantic configurations are not transient optimization anomalies, but structurally stable, risk-aware attractors generated by recursive autoregressive dynamics.

</details>


### [480] [Second-Best Bilateral Trade is $1/2$ Efficient](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.03849)
*Zhengyang Liu,Ying Qin,Zeyu Ren,Zihe Wang*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文证明了双边贸易中，贝叶斯最优（次优）机制总能捕获至少一半的第一最优贸易收益（SB ≥ 1/2 FB），该下界是紧的，解决了长期存在的效率损失上限问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Myerson-Satterthwaite定理指出双边贸易中不可能同时实现事后有效率、个体理性和强预算平衡，但效率损失的具体程度一直是悬而未决的问题。

Method: 通过理论分析，推导贝叶斯最优（次优）机制与第一最优（全知）机制之间贸易收益比值的紧下界。

Result: 证明SB ≥ 1/2 FB，即次优机制总能实现至少一半的第一最优收益，且该界是紧的。

Conclusion: 将此前已知的0.317到0.736的区间精确收紧到1/2，彻底回答了双边贸易效率损失的根本问题。

Abstract: The landmark Myerson-Satterthwaite Theorem establishes a fundamental impossibility in bilateral trade: no Bayesian incentive-compatible mechanism can simultaneously achieve ex-post efficiency, individual rationality, and strong budget balance. We resolve a long-standing open question regarding the efficiency loss imposed by these constraints. Specifically, we prove that the Bayesian-optimal (second-best) mechanism always captures at least half of the first-best gains from trade ($\mathrm{SB}\ge\frac{1}{2}\mathrm{FB}$). This result is tight, definitively closing the gap between the previously best-known bounds of $0.317$ and $0.736$.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [481] [Oscillatory State-Space Models as Inductive Biases for Physics-Informed Neural PDE Solvers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.02623)
*Abhishek Chandra,Taniya Kapoor*

Main category: cs.NE
